Name: Four Hands
Description:
Welcome to Four Hands. For over 25 years, we've been a leading designer and wholesaler of well-crafted furniture and décor, helping people create spaces that feel like home.

Founded in Austin in 1996, Four Hands has international offices in China, India, Vietnam, Mexico, Indonesia, and showrooms in High Point, North Carolina, Las Vegas, Nevada, and Austin, Texas. Our team enthusiastically supports the growing needs of large retail chains, as well as independent regional stores and interior designers.  

Our pieces are unique to us — the product of careful trendspotting, selected materials and innovative design techniques for an ever-expanding assortment. Our trade customers have 24/7 online access to 6,000 design-forward products, from living and dining room to art, outdoor, accessories, and more.  

Receiving numerous recognitions and accolades, including ranking in the Inc. 5000 list 14 times, Four Hands is one of the most dynamic companies in the furniture industry today. We hire the most experienced people in the industry and talented individuals with robust backgrounds to bring a fresh approach to the furniture business. As a team, we actively challenge ourselves on the notion of what’s possible. The only thing we take more seriously than doing great work is having great fun.

• Marketplace : plus de 20 000 références de mobilier reconditionné ou éco-conçu, sourcées auprès de 50 marchands partenaires, avec un service clé en main (sourcing, logistique, installation).

• Studio Bluedigo : accompagnement sur mesure pour des projets d’aménagement complets, de la conception à la livraison.

• Offre Revive : diagnostic et revalorisation du mobilier existant pour réduire les coûts, éviter le gaspillage, et prolonger la durée de vie de ce qui existe déjà.

Déjà plus de 2 500 clients accompagnés, dont France Télévisions, Decathlon, SNCF, Bouygues Construction, MAIF, Orange Bank, Ministère de l’Intérieur.

Un modèle agile, avec stock décentralisé, et pensé pour rendre l’économie circulaire concrète, mesurable, et accessible.

Basés à Paris, actifs partout en France.

Description:
Established in 1973, we are a specialist designer, manufacturer and distributor of disruptive Home Furnishings that people want in their home. At the heart of our fast-paced and energetic culture is a commitment to exceptional product design and industry-leading manufacturing. We're on a mission to help furnish more and more homes each and every day, to deliver joy and comfort for all customers.

What sets Riva Home apart is the end-to-end 'turnkey' service we offer. Not only do we design our products and manufacture them, but we also stock and distribute them too. We even provide the aftersales support and digital technology to make things simple and easy for our customers.

We are proud to be supporting Martin House Children’s Hospice, an incredible charity who provide specialist care to babies, children and young people with complex and life-shortening conditions. THE BUILD project will provide a new state-of-the-art hospice with new and improved facilities to enhance and expand the specialist palliative care they already provide.  We will be donating 1p per unit sold across the entirety of the Riva Home Group, as well as donating stock and all proceeds from an exciting calendar of fundraising events in 2024 and beyond.

Name: Şeritcioğlu Mobilya
Description:
Upholstery is an industry but also a craft.
 
It is possible to standardize and qualify upholstery by using right material, appropriate technology and correct knowledge and also to convert upholstery to serial industrial production by minimizing the influence of  individual ability. However, while technology is continuously developing it's impossible to neutralize the effect of craft because of  the need of creativeness.
 
While some manufacturers in Turkey prefer to minimize the costs in order to address to low end market, some other producers use the qualified and standard production as a means of marketing gun for success.
 
The importance of export increased because of the economical difficulties as well as  the organic link between export and the qualified and standard production .
 
We are a company aiming to bring continuous novelties to Turkey and to rise the level of quality. Lately we have the signature on several novelties.You can visit our showroom to see all the these novelties together.
 
We know that most of our solutions are imported. Some of our products are sold from our stocks and the others are being imported on demand. Whatever the way our mission is to minimize the effect of import on you.
 
The common denominator of  the solutions we present in the upholstery is quality, standardization and performance.
We hope increase in export and Turkey being one of the upholstery centers in the world.

Name: fenyxº
Description:
Whether you're growing quickly, consolidating locations, or rethinking your workspace - fenyx offers sustainable solutions adapted to your specific needs.

Companies across Europe choose fenyx to turn surplus furniture into value - by selecting from a range of solutions including smart inventory processes to assess existing assets, efficient resale, internal employee sales programs, and the professional refurbishment of office furniture to preserve asset value. All designed to maximize reuse and minimize waste.

fenyx also designs and delivers modern work environments - from planning to logistics and installation. Using a wide range of premium refurbished furniture from our Europe-wide platform network, we create circular workspaces that are flexible and uncompromising in quality. All furnishings are available as rental or purchase options, adapted to your goals, budget, and timeline. Far beyond what the traditional linear model can offer.

Our model delivers measurable results: up to 45% cost savings, 108 kg CO₂ saved per workstation, and delivery in less than two weeks. All within a 100% circular process.

More than 100 corporates, scale-ups, and coworking providers have already worked with fenyx to reach their sustainability targets.

Ready to transform your office - sustainably, cost-effectively, and fast? Let’s talk.

Name: Fima Carlo Frattini - Africa
Description:
The history of FIMA (Fabbrica Italiana Mixers Accessories) runs parallel to that of bathroom furnishings and interior design and is based on three precise values that summarize its design philosophy: #Green #Quality #Design. The company – founded in 1960 by Carlo Frattini – has a dynamic, international and contemporary character. Finding expression in its unique and innovative solutions, with particular attention to the environment and eco-sustainability, whilst maintaining high standards of design, quality and functionality.

Focusing on the environment- 
We have efficient management systems in place at various processing stages, using the latest generation machinery and systems to minimize consumption. All waste brass is collected during manufacturing and re-used. 

Our production center is powered by solar energy, it's equipped with a "zero impact" galvanic system, capable of working with more modern Trivalent Chromium plating methods which, unlike hexavalent chromium (currently used by 90 % of manufacturers). It's free of carcinogenic elements and does not produce waste, significantly reducing our waste percentage.
- Source: Fima Italy

Our journey has been marked by continuous evolution and innovation, and we've always stayed ahead of the curve in offering the latest and best hardware solutions.

Name: RAPC PT - Furniture and Home Deco Supplier - Est. 2015
Description:
RAPC is a 100% foreign-owned, family-operated company rooted in the vibrant cultural tapestry of Indonesia. Based in the bustling creative hub of Bali, with a satellite factory in Jepara—the heart of Indonesia’s furniture-making region—we specialize in exporting home decor and furniture that embody the spirit of Indonesian craftsmanship.

Our Belgian heritage merges seamlessly with local traditions as we work with a wide variety of materials sourced from across the Indonesian archipelago. With our in-house sample production and design teams, we are constantly pushing the boundaries of creativity, introducing 200-300 new, innovative items to our catalog every month. Whether it’s rattan, wicker, stone, or other natural materials, we are dedicated to blending these elements into unique, modern products that captivate global markets.

RAPC PT directly employs over 120 skilled individuals, and through our extensive network of subcontractors, we support over 2,000 workers in rural areas of Indonesia. In many of these regions, stable employment opportunities are scarce, with many locals relying solely on subsistence farming. Through the work we provide, entire communities are empowered—families can improve their quality of life, put food on their tables, and ensure their children receive an education.

At RAPC PT, we believe that every product we create tells a story—a story of tradition, innovation, and the positive impact we bring to local communities. We’re not just exporting furniture and decor; we’re exporting hope, opportunity, and a brighter future for those we work with.



 Contact us today at info@rapc-pt.com for Wholesale inquiries, Villa, Restaurant and Hotel Projects!
 Explore more in our Virtual Showroom: http://rapc-pt.com/showroom.html
 Visit us Fysically (make an appointment!): https://maps.app.goo.gl/NAiym2qE3oRqMCnL8

Name: Sunan Malzemecilik
Description:
1984 yılından itibaren mobilya sektöründe malzeme tedariği yapmakta olan, faaliyetlerine İstanbul’da başlayarak, 1996 yılı itibari ile Sakarya’da devam eden ticaret firmasıdır. Belirli bir zaman sektörde şehrine hizmet eden firma 2003 yılından itibaren doğu marmara bölgesi ve batı karadeniz bölgelerine servis ve hizmet sağlayarak bölgesel bir işletme haline gelmiştir. Firma ihtiyaç duyulan tüm malzemeleri stoklu çalıştığı için sektöründe hızla büyüyen ve aranan bir firma konumundadır. Günümüzde Sunan Malzeme çeşitli ulusal ve uluslar arası fuarlarda yer almaktadır. Firmanın Erenler/SAKARYA, Serdivan/SAKARYA, İnegöl/BURSA ve İzmit/KOCAELİ olmak üzere 4 farklı satış noktası bulunmakta olup İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Samsun, ve Kayseri bölgelerinde bu illere ve çevre illere satış hizmeti vermek adına home office olarak çalışan pazarlama ekibi ile beraber toplamda 80 personel istihdam etmektedir. Malzemeciliğin yanında sunta ebatlama, kenar bantlama, döşemelik kumaş kapitonesi ve sünger kesim imalatı da yaparak tüm Türkiye’ye hizmet vermektedir.
Sunan Malzeme ikinci nesle devrolmak üzere olan, kurumsallaşmaya ve inovasyona önem veren bir firmadır. Kullanmış olduğu raf sistemleri, barkod ve RFID sistemleri ile stok takibi ve depolama sisteminde, kendi yazılımları olan B2B ve B2C sistemleri ile e-ticarette sektöründe en öne çıkmaktadır. Tüm bu sistemleri,2017 yılından itibaren kullandığı üstün ve özel ERP sistemleri olan SAP ile online olarak entegre etmiş olup bu sistemler üzerinde yapılan sevk, sipariş, tahsilat gibi herhangi işlemlerin otomatik olarak kayıt altına alınmaktadır. Böylece insan hatasını minimize ederek, canlı ve zahmetsiz CRM (müşteri ilişkileri yönetimi) sistemleri kendi kendilerine işlemesini sağlar.
Bu çerçevede Sunan Malzeme, Türkiye ve Dünya pazarında müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına ve gerek imalat gerekse pazarda yaşadığı sorunlarına ortakmış gibi çözüm arayarak her alanda kazan kazan ilişkisini kurup sektörel kalkınmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: Bo Office
Description:
La mission de Bo Office est d'offrir aux fabricants, aux revendeurs et aux professionnels de l'aménagement la possibilité d'acheter en direct d'usine du mobilier de bureau (composants et produits finis) avec un minimum d'intermédiaires, ce qui leur permet à la fois de remporter de nouveaux marchés avec des marges supérieures, tout en démocratisant certains produits réputés aujourd'hui encore trop coûteux (bureaux assis debout, accessoires d'électrification, fabrication de petites et grandes séries de mobilier sur mesure...).

Afin d'offrir les meilleures conditions d'achat à ses clients, Bo Office a établi des partenariats avec des fabricants sélectionnés pour leur rapport qualité-prix, leur fiabilité, leur sens du service, dans différents pays du monde (France, Italie, Espagne, Portugal, Chine, Turquie, etc.), et met à disposition de ses clients son expertise en matière de logistique pour assurer un approvisionnement fluide et simple.

Notre expertise et nos usines, menuiseries industrielles et métallerie industrielle, transforment vos idées en réalité.
Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions uniques et personnalisées pour les architectes, les designers et les décorateurs.
Si vous recherchez une approche sur-mesure pour répondre aux besoins de vos clients les plus exigeants, vous êtes au bon endroit.

En travaillant avec Bo Office, vous accélérez le développement de votre activité et votre rentabilité car:

- vous réduisez vos coûts en achetant directement auprès des meilleures usines
- vous identifiez les sources d'approvisionnement les plus adaptées à vos contraintes de planning
- vous construisez une offre commerciale différenciante autour de produits personnalisés
- vous ouvrez la possibilité de répondre à de nouveaux types de projets

Name: TRJ per l’Architettura
Description:
TRJ works in high-end market segment of furniture and lighting as an exclusive agent for the most important brands, leader in design, innovation and respect of the environment. 

Many prestigious brands have chosen TRJ as their partner, such as: Alias, Artemide, Cappellini, Cassina, Kartell, Lago, Rimadesio, Valcucine,Crf.

In general, the common denominator of all our work is versatility, the capacity to adapt to the requests and the dynamics of companies and contexts very different between them and knowing how to respond in a punctual way to the different needs of those who trust in our specific know how.

TRJ works mainly in Sicily (Italy) and Malta. For some of the above-mentioned brands TRJ has gained an important experience in the MENA region, where it works for single projects. As for now, TRJ is also agent for Valcucine in the UAE. 

WHAT DOES THE  TRJ TEAM DO?

LISTEN. Our work always starts with a moment of listening and comparison, followed by the collection of a brief that keeps track of what was shared. Meetings that give us the way to get in touch with the design idea to then successively turn into an action plan.

ELABORATION. The next step is to think, to research and to elaborate the best solution which takes into account all the requests made by the architect and by the client. From this crucial phase comes the proposal which we present to our interlocutors in another important moment to share . 

VERIFICATION. A project must be “lived”, following and monitoring all the phases, living it closely through site inspections and visits, absorbing its true meaning and ultimate value. 

SERVICE. The perfect installation, the very delicate phase of installation fitting the products, is a guarantee of the choice made. During this very important phase it is pleasant and exciting for us to see the project finally realized and guaranteed through our supervision.

Description:

We pride ourselves on curating in-house collections tailored to meet the latest home styling trends in Australia. With supplier partnerships exceeding 20 years, our industry expertise ensures we import only the finest qualities that offer the best value for all markets we represent.

Join us on our journey of transforming spaces with stylish and high-quality rugs, curated with a deep understanding of our customers' needs. Follow us on Facebook and Instagram to stay updated with our latest collections.

Description: Somos una empresa mexicana que busca potencializar espacios a través de muebles y accesorios contemporáneos, que fusionen diseño, funcionalidad y vanguardismo. Nos dedicamos a seleccionar cuidadosamente piezas que se adapten a cualquier proyecto, ofreciendo una experiencia de compra única, donde la satisfacción del cliente es nuestra prioridad.

Name: Pro-living
Description:
Pro-living, c’est avant tout une aventure familiale ancrée à Rumilly, au cœur des montagnes de Haute-Savoie.

Depuis plus de 20 ans, les trois frères fondateurs — Thierry, Jérôme et Frédéric — créent et sélectionnent des meubles au design sobre, naturel et authentique, inspirés des modes de vie actuels.

 Forts de cette expérience, nous mettons chaque jour notre expertise et notre passion au service de nos clients professionnels.

Au fil du temps, l’équipe s’est agrandie. Ce qui nous unit ? Des valeurs humaines fortes : proximité, convivialité et partage.

Aujourd’hui, Pro-living, c’est une équipe soudée, engagée, et animée par une même ambition : créer des pièces uniques pour réinventer votre intérieur.

Name: Ixia & Denzzo
Description:
Con 29 años IXIA se ha convertido en una marca líder de diseño global, distribución de mobiliario y decoración con presencia en más de 45 países, con una amplia red comercial y un equipo humano en sus instalaciones de más de 70 personas.

Fundada en el año 1996 y en constante evolución desde su fundación, desarrolla su actividad en el Polígono Industrial de Ibi – Alicante, donde contamos con unas instalaciones, oficinas, centro de distribución y almacén de 60.000m² totalmente equipados y con un showroom durante todo el año de más de 1.500 m² como un punto de encuentro para los amantes de la decoración y del interiorismo. 

Nuestras principales líneas son la decoración hogar, mueble auxiliar, mobiliario de jardín, iluminación, regalo, decoración vertical y textil, cerámica decorativa y navidad.

Seguimos cuidadosamente todo el proceso de nuestras colecciones con el fin de crear diseños atractivos y funcionales, unidos a la calidad y a precios competitivos. Y esto solo ocurre cuando lo que se hace, se hace con pasión, energía y optimismo.

Name: Starfurn
Description: Starfurn is een snelgroeiende meubelgroothandel met een sterke focus op de beste prijs-kwaliteit verhouding. We vernieuwen ons aanbod voortdurend met stijlvolle, complete woonseries in diverse stijlen die verrassend, eigentijds en perfect afgestemd zijn op de laatste trends. Ons brede assortiment is altijd scherp geprijsd en up-to-date. Dankzij onze grote voorraad en eigen bezorgservice garanderen we snelle levertijden voor al onze verkooppunten.

Name: Henry & Co Home Fragrance
Description:
Henry & Co Home Fragrance was born from a mutual love of home fragrance by two business associates and a passion for creating and delivering a home fragrance experience like no other on the high street. Our founders Mark & Jo have many years of retail experience within the home fragrance industry and in 2021 when our retail stores closed, it gave them an opportunity to focus and peruse a dream of theirs to create their own brand of home fragrance products. 

We pride ourselves on exceptional home fragrance products and the small team that produces them. Every one of our products is mixed, poured and packed by hand in our Yorkshire workshop and distributed throughout the UK.  
At Henry & Co Home Fragrance we produce small batch, handmade wax melts, scented candles, reed diffusers and aroma oils, as well as a range accessories and gift sets - direct to customer and to wholesale in many of the leading garden centers and independent gift stores in the UK. 
We use top quality ingredients which are all cruelty free and vegan friendly. We source as many of our raw components and packaging as we can from local suppliers across the UK, and make a conscious effort to design all of our packaging to be environmentally friendly, weather it is compostable glassine bags for wax melts, recyclable reed diffuser tubes and reed diffuser refill bottles to candle vessels that can be reused or recycled in your household waste.

Name: Quooker Italia
Description:
Quooker è una multinazionale familiare olandese che ha inventato l’elettrodomestico in grado di erogare istantaneamente acqua bollente a 100*C dal miscelatore della cucina e in 50 anni di storia è diventata leader di mercato globale in questo segmento. 
Oltre all'acqua bollente istantanea offre anche la soluzione per avere acqua a temperatura ambiente o refrigerata, frizzante o naturale, sempre filtrate e sempre dallo stesso rubinetto.

Siamo orgogliosi di miscelare il nostro design premium con l'alta qualità realizzando i nostri prodotti interamente nelle nostre fabbriche in Olanda ed abbiamo costituito Quooker Italia nel Settembre del 2021. La filiale è stata costruita per fornire un servizio di alto livello, adottando un approccio di marketing efficace e con un occhio molto attento al customer care.

Name: Z&V - Consultancy & Supply
Description:
Your one-stop partner, delivering a comprehensive range of services and products designed specifically for the CoWorking, CoLiving, and Hospitality industries.

From architecture and interior design to product development and standard fit-out procurement, we excel at designing, manufacturing, and delivering bespoke products. Our solutions are carefully crafted, shipped, and installed on-site to ensure the perfect fit for your project.  

Our project management approach prioritizes expertise and collaboration. Each team is strategically composed of skilled professionals, led by a senior executive who oversees the process to guarantee the successful delivery of desired outcomes.

With a proven track record in supporting diverse commercial programs, we offer flexibility to accommodate the evolving needs of your business. Whether managing single-site projects or rolling out multiple locations annually, our tailored approach ensures consistent success.

Leveraging advanced technology and cost-competitive industries, we continuously push boundaries, creating new possibilities to enhance your brand.

Operating with sustainability at the core of our mission, we adhere to strict environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles. We respect human rights, labor regulations, health, safety, and environmental (HSE) standards, as well as uphold the highest ethical integrity. Our partnerships are built exclusively with suppliers who align with these values, as outlined in our Code of Conduct.  

Let us transform your vision into reality, delivering solutions that elevate your business and brand.

As vertically integrated manufacturers of our own products in our own factories in South Africa, we ensure each product meets our high standard of excellence, while providing opportunities to skillful artisans and a growing labor force dedicated to delivering the best possible products on time, every time. 

Woodline Shade Solutions USA has partnered with a leading supply chain partner renowned for its exceptional customer service, expertise, and influential role in the development of trade practices that affect importers and exporters.

You deal with a US company, and we deliver from our North American warehouse in Champlain, New York directly to you. We fill up our USA inventory from South Africa which allows us to offer faster deliveries and exceptional service to our customers.

Name: CROCUS CONTRACT
Description:
At Crocus Contract, we are dedicated to crafting custom furniture that transforms hospitality environments, creating memorable guest experiences and enhancing brand identity. With over a decade of expertise in the industry, our commitment to quality craftsmanship and personalized service is the foundation of everything we do. We understand that each project is unique, so our team works closely with clients to ensure every piece is tailored to their vision and functional requirements.

Our extensive range of offerings includes bespoke chairs, tables, sofas, and a variety of seating solutions designed for the high demands of hotels, restaurants, cafes, and commercial spaces. We prioritize both durability and aesthetics, combining expert techniques with top-quality materials to ensure that our furniture withstands the test of time in vibrant, high-traffic settings.

To deliver on the unique needs of each project, we leverage a global network of partners, sourcing exclusive materials and finishes to bring even the most intricate concepts to life. Whether you’re seeking a one-of-a-kind design or a distinctive twist on a classic style, our team is equipped to handle requests of any scale and complexity.

At Crocus Contract, customer satisfaction is paramount. Our knowledgeable and responsive team is committed to guiding clients through every step, from initial concept and material selection to final delivery. We take pride in our seamless project management, ensuring that the journey of furnishing your space is smooth and rewarding. Partner with us to elevate your brand with furniture that combines form, function, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

Transform your space and experience the difference that custom furniture can make with Crocus Contract.

Name: Kolbi
Description:
In 2022, Kolbi was born from a simple yet ambitious idea: to make good design more accessible for the Australian trade industry.

At the time, the wholesale furniture market felt saturated, but disconnected. The options were either over-complicated or overpriced — and the design community was asking for more. More flexibility. More consistency. More heart.

So, we stepped into the gap.

Kolbi began not as a showroom, but as a solution — a response to the real, everyday needs of interior designers, property stylists, and developers. We launched with a curated range of timeless, trade-focused pieces that delivered on design, reliability, and value. No fluff. No compromise.

From day one, we were clear on what we stood for:
- Effortless design
- Reliable service
- Genuine partnerships

As a small team with big dreams, we navigated a fast-moving landscape — juggling global supply chains, evolving lead times, and the ever-changing pulse of the interiors industry. But we stayed true to our vision. We listened closely to our clients. We worked hard. And we kept moving.

Each challenge became a lesson. Each win, a step forward.
And from that momentum, Kolbi grew — product by product, client by client, conversation by conversation.

In just a short time, we’ve proudly established a presence in the Australian design community. We opened our first showroom in Paddington, followed closely by our Queensland space in Teneriffe — spaces created not just to display furniture, but to foster connection.

Today, Kolbi stands as a trusted partner to the trade. We’re still young, still evolving, and still hungry to do things differently. But what’s always driven us — and what always will — is the belief that great design should be easy to specify and exceptional to experience.

Because this isn’t just about furniture.
It’s about helping creatives bring their visions to life — and building a business that grows alongside them.

We are Kolbi.
And we’re just getting started.

Name: Inter Maks
Description: Headquartered in Novi Sad, Inter Maks is a company that imports and distributes sinks, hoods and aluminum profiles for the needs of furniture manufacturers, furniture salons, white goods salons and carpentry workshops as well as end customers. Naar ons idee is er namelijk geen betere manier om de mensen daar te leren kennen. Daarnaast zien we dan met eigen ogen dat de producten die te koop zijn bij Noa May door echte ambachtslieden worden gemaakt. Mooier kan niet, toch? Name: OFIXCHILE
Description:
En Ofix Chile nos dedicamos a importar y comercializar muebles de oficina de la más alta calidad, diseñados para brindar comodidad, estilo y funcionalidad a todos nuestros clientes. Nuestra misión es transformar los espacios de trabajo, creando ambientes que fomenten la productividad, la colaboración y el bienestar de los colaboradores.

Con una amplia gama de productos, desde escritorios y sillas ergonómicas hasta sistemas de almacenamiento y espacios para reuniones, ofrecemos soluciones completas para cualquier tipo de oficina. 
Trabajamos de la mano con reconocidas marcas internacionales, asegurando que nuestros muebles cumplan con los más altos estándares de calidad y durabilidad.

En Ofix Chile nos distinguimos por nuestro compromiso con el servicio al cliente. Nuestro equipo de expertos está siempre dispuesto a brindar asesoramiento personalizado, ayudando a nuestros clientes a tomar decisiones informadas y encontrar la solución perfecta para sus necesidades específicas.

Somos una empresa enfocada en la satisfacción del cliente. Nos esforzamos por superar sus expectativas en términos de calidad, diseño, precio y entrega puntual. Además, nos preocupamos por el medio ambiente, por lo que promovemos la utilización de materiales sostenibles y prácticas responsables en nuestra cadena de suministro.

En resumen, en Ofix Chile estamos comprometidos con la excelencia en el suministro de muebles de oficina, brindando soluciones innovadoras y de calidad que permitan a nuestros clientes crear espacios de trabajo funcionales, estéticamente agradables y que impulsen el éxito de sus negocios.

Name: Commonwealth Home Fashions
Description:
Commonwealth Home Fashions was founded in 1946 by brothers Myer, Jack, Morris, Philip, and Saul Levenson. They named the company after the Royal Canadian Air Force’s Commonwealth Flying Squadron, where Saul served during World War II. At the time, it was called the Commonwealth Curtain Company, one of many department stores in Canada. 

Commonwealth has experienced many changes over seven decades. It operated two factories in England from 1957 to 1981. In the late 1970s, it acquired Richmark International of Boston and amalgamated the company into Commonwealth in 1995. In the ‘80s and ‘90s, it was Dan River’s distributor in Canada and manufactured parts of the Dan River line for the Canadian market. 

In the early 1980s, the company began U.S distribution and manufacturing in Montreal and upstate New York. It now works with manufacturing partners in China, India, Pakistan, Turkey, and South America to produce products like fabric window curtains, shower curtains, and pillows. We recognize the need for solution-based products – energy efficient, room darkening, and health benefits. We have developed winning products like Thermaplus Total Blackout curtains and SilverClear – a potent antibacterial agent that inhibits the growth of germs and kills bacteria. Please find us at your nearest retailer or online through Amazon, Walmart, Wayfair, Linen Chest, Bed bath & beyond, JC Penny, Hudson Bay, and more.

Wir freuen uns, Ihnen unser Unternehmen A+O vorstellen zu dürfen – eine Organisation, die fest an die Kraft der Transformation glaubt und unsere Mission mit dem Slogan "Wir für TRANSformation" verkörpert.

 **Unsere Mission**: Bei A+O sind wir leidenschaftlich darin, Unternehmen auf ihrem Weg zur Transformation zu begleiten. Wir verstehen, dass Veränderung der Schlüssel zum Wachstum und zur Zukunftsfähigkeit ist. Unser Ziel ist es, gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden Visionen zu entwickeln und diese in die Tat umzusetzen.

 **Unsere Expertise**: Unsere Experten verfügen über jahrelange Erfahrung im Bereich der Transformation und sind hochqualifiziert, um maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu entwickeln, die unseren Kunden helfen, ihre ehrgeizigsten Ziele zu erreichen. Wir schaffen nicht nur Veränderung, sondern auch langfristigen Mehrwert.

 **Zusammenarbeit und Innovation**: In einer sich ständig verändernden Geschäftswelt setzen wir auf Zusammenarbeit und innovative Ansätze, um Unternehmen dabei zu unterstützen, erfolgreich zu sein. Unsere Dienstleistungen sind darauf ausgerichtet, die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit unserer Kunden zu steigern und sie für die Zukunft zu rüsten.

 **Unsere Werte**: Bei A+O legen wir Wert auf Integrität, Exzellenz, Kundenorientierung und nachhaltiges Denken. Wir glauben an die Bedeutung von Beziehungen und sind stolz darauf, langfristige Partnerschaften mit unseren Kunden aufzubauen.

 **Unsere Vision**: Unsere Vision ist es, die Art und Weise, wie Unternehmen Transformation angehen, zu verändern und zu verbessern. Wir sehen Veränderung als Chance und sind bestrebt, sie positiv zu gestalten.

Vielen Dank für Ihr Interesse an A+O - "Wir für TRANSformation". Wir freuen uns darauf, mit Ihnen in Kontakt zu treten und gemeinsam die Welt der Veränderung zu gestalten!

Lukas Buschhaus

Batılı Mobilya A.Ş.’nin hikayesi 1977 yılında, iki kardeş olan Mehmet Naci Ulusoy ve Hakkı Ulusoy’un, ilk firmaları Ulusoy Pazarlama Kolektif Şirketini kurmaları ile başladı. Firma ilk iş yerini İzmir Çankaya’da faaliyete geçirip, burada sünger yatak üretimi ve satışı, ayrıca yaylı yatak ve battaniye gibi ürünlerin Ege Bölgesi’ne toptan satışını gerçekleştirmiştir. 1986 yılında atölyesini İzmir Karabağlar’a taşıyıp, burada çekyat üretimine başlayan firma, Türkiye’nin ilk yaylı kanepe üreticisi olan Marmara A.Ş. ile ana bayilik sözleşmesini imzalamıştır. Bu ana bayilik 1992 yılına kadar devam etmiştir.

1992 yılında, yollarının İstikbal markası ile kesişmesiyle Batılı Mobilya San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. kurulmuştur. İstikbal markası ile Ege 1. Bölge ana bayilik sözleşmesi imzalanarak İstikbal markalı ürünlerin Ege Bölgesinde satış ve satış sonrası hizmetler faaliyetlerine başlanmıştır. Devamındaki yıllarda Bellona, Mondi, Gümüşsuyu ve Doqu markaları da bünyeye katılarak İzmir, Manisa, Denizli ve Muğla illerinde güçlü bir bayi ağı oluşturulmuştur. Batılı A.Ş. bugün, İzmir Torbalı’da, 30.000 m2’si kapalı, toplam 150.000 m2’lik bir alanda, 40 yılı aşkın tecrübesiyle, 150 çalışanı ve sayısı 100’ü bulan güçlü iş ortakları ile Ege Bölgesinde ticari faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Name: Blanc Mariclo'
Description:
ABOUT US
Blanc MariClò is a family history, an Italian story where work and family come together in 1926.

First there is a grandfather, who sells fabrics and tarpaulins, then a father, who develops the production of a complete home linen collection and now two sisters, nephews and daughters, who decide to create a real total look for the house also producing furniture and home decorations.

The Blanc MariClò style is absolutely personal and recognizable, born from the memories of a Tuscan childhood and then evolved and integrated with the inspirations of a life in which everything becomes work. Every holiday or journey, book or art exhibition is thus transformed into the starting point for a new collection.

Today the brand boasts a worldwide distribution, from the heart of Tuscany day by day, step by step it has managed to conquer space in the best windows, from Italy to the Middle East, from the Far East to the Americas.


OUR VISION
Our first mission is to imagine, even before creating or producing.

We must imagine the house as a space of hospitality and love, for family and friendship, for rest and joy. We must imagine atmospheres where feelings are the first stylistic note.

The attention to detail then becomes the tool to express care for those who live our spaces. We must imagine that our products can attend the small daily gestures is a commitment and an inexhaustible source of emotion


OUR VALUES
The Blanc MariClò collections are the result of our personal history, like a filter that manages to make every new idea and inspiration unique and unrepeatable.

They are the memories of our Tuscan childhood, the family as a personal and work support value.

As women and working mothers, we are happy to manage a company with a large majority of female workers, and to try to create an harmonious working environment able to combine the needs of work and the needs of family.

Name: OE Group
Description:
OE Group - About Us
Ergonomics isn't just about furniture. It's about unlocking human potential.
For over 20 years, OE Group has been transforming workspaces across the UK—not with one-size-fits-all solutions, but with science-backed ergonomics that put people first. From bustling corporate headquarters to quiet home offices, from employees with musculoskeletal issues to entire organisations, we create environments where comfort fuels performance and wellbeing drives productivity.

Our story began in 2002 as Online Ergonomics Ltd. What started as a mission to make ergonomic expertise accessible has evolved into OE Group—a trusted partner for individuals, businesses, institutions, Access to Work clients, and trade dealers who refuse to settle for "good enough."

We don't just sell products. We deliver transformations.

Every recommendation we make is rooted in research, shaped by two decades of experience, and tailored to real needs. Whether it's designing an inclusive workspace for a neurodiverse team member or orchestrating an ergonomic overhaul for hundreds of employees, our approach remains the same: precise, practical, and always centered on the person using the space.

Because when people work well, everything works better.

What We Deliver

TonicSpaces entwirft Einrichtunskonzepte nach modernsten New-Work, Design- und Funktionalitätsstandards und integriert dabei Erkenntnisse aus innovativen Workspace Analytics. Dort werden die individuellen Bedarfe und Herausforderungen unserer Kunden, von individuellen Mitarbeiterwünschen über den Budgetrahmen, bis hin zu Raum- und Flächenbegebenheiten berücksichtigt und für die Konzeption in spezifische Handlungsfelder übersetzt.

TonicSpaces platziert in der Umsetzung als deutschlandweit erster Anbieter eine Kombination aus Bestandsmöbeln, aufbereiteten (#refurbished) Büromöbeln und nachhaltig produzierten neuen Alternativen und zertifiziert Kunden die erreichten CO2 Einsparungen. 

Wir sind stolz auf 30+ erfolgreiche Projekte, in denen unsere Kunden hunderte Tonnen CO2 eingespart haben.

Mit TonicSpaces zusammenzuarbeiten heißt, sich aktiv für die Kreislaufwirtschaft zu entscheiden und eine Kehrtwende von dem linearen Verbrauchermodell vorzunehmen. Wir freuen uns über jedes Projekt, in dem wir in konstruktiver Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden eine maßgeschneiderte Transformation ganzheitlich nachhaltig planen und umsetzen können.

Wir sind deutschlandweit an 10+ Standorten vertreten.

Name: PT Nara Viva Trading
Description:
Nara Viva is a sourcing partner for premium indoor and outdoor furniture made in Indonesia. We offer one-stop support for international buyers covering design assistance, factory selection, production supervision, quality control, packing engineering, loading supervision, and full export documentation management.

Our focus is on teak, mahogany, and rattan furniture produced by selected manufacturers in Indonesia. We work only with A/B grade wood and provide FSC certified material upon request. Each order is monitored at every stage through detailed QC reporting, including moisture control, finishing checks, hardware verification, stability tests, and packing inspection.

We support retailers, importers, e-commerce companies, project developers, and boutique design studios that need consistent production, reliable quality, and a partner who can oversee all stages on their behalf. For projects that require customization, Nara Viva provides design adaptation, material guidance, and fabric foam combinations suitable for indoor and outdoor use.

Our service continues until the final moment the goods are loaded at the factory. We supervise container loading, ensure proper packing, secure palletizing when required, and prepare all export documents. Buyers receive photo reports, timeline updates, and transparent communication throughout the entire process.

Nara Viva enables international buyers to source from Indonesia with confidence, without the need to manage factories, travel frequently, or coordinate multiple vendors.

For catalog and sourcing inquiries: info@naraviva.com

Name: Babmar International
Description:

We specialize in manufacturing the highest quality commercial grade outdoor furniture on the market and are known for our stylish designs and affordability. Babmar is an established worldwide luxury outdoor furniture manufacturer specializing in the contract, commercial and hospitality industry.

Babmar is a privately owned corporation with its head office and warehouse distribution center based in San Diego, California. The company was founded in 2004, at the beginning of the all weather wicker handwoven revolution, and has grown steadily to become one of the top manufacturers in producing modern outdoor all weather wicker furniture.

Babmar is constantly monitoring ways to cut manufacturing cost in order to bring you the best quality at the most reasonable price. In addition to cutting cost we also continue to update our collection of furniture to offer more new and exciting designs each season.


• Durable Quality: Durability is our highest priority. Our outdoor furniture withstands the elements and is built to handle commercial heavy usage while retaining its look and functionality.
• Innovation: Research and development is one of the cornerstones of Babmar. Our strength is our endless passion for seeking out new, natural-looking materials for commercial outdoor furniture that defies all weathers.
• Unmatched Comfort: Beautiful and comfortable? A comfortable sitting experience is one of our highest priorities.
• Unmatched Service: Consistently providing all our clients with a pleasant attitude while offering knowledgeable and resourceful resources. Our team takes a step further by exceeding rather than meeting expectations.

Name: Topcent Furniture Hardware
Description:

In the new business model, relying on years of business growth, Topcent conducted a comprehensive upgrade in 2007 , and founded TOPCENT HARDWARE CO., LTD. After ten years of steady development, it has become a banner of the home hardware industry. Its huge potential and vitality are favored by the majority of the industry!

Concentrating on two core business furniture hardware and decorative hardware, Topcent product system covers slides, hinges, handles, connectors and other 14 major product modules. Basing on four supporting manufacturing bases Foshan, Gaoyao, Jieyang and Lufeng, with Guangzhou Logistics center as the main center, and with enterprise service center as link, Topcent forms a healthy and efficient home hardware ecosystem.

Topcent now has 10 major functional departments, 100-hundred professional elites, 1600㎡marketing center, 1200㎡logistics center, 500㎡product experience exhibition hall, 200㎡product research and development laboratories. Through organic combination of ERP, CRM management system, trade exhibition platform and e-commerce platform O2O marketing mode, we provide full service to buyers and applicants from 87 countries and regions in the world.

Topcent keep insisting on our core values of "People-oriented, Cooperation, Share, Win-Win" and respecting every person. Through teamwork, we keep our spirit of entrepreneurship, honor and dishonor in mind, and adhere to our principle of mutual benefit and win-win sustainable development.

While seeking steady enterprise development, Topcent actively participate in various public affairs and strive to shoulder corporate social responsibility with the mission of "cultivate the wealth, strengthen our country, and make the world a better place."

TOPCENT, More Than Hardware.

Name: REAL PIEL RP
Description: Real Piel S.r.l. is an Italian company and brand specializing in genuine leather products, with a focus on upholstery materials and furniture design. Established in 2005 in Bassano del Grappa, Veneto—a region celebrated for its cultural and artistic heritage—Real Piel has grown from a trader of high-quality Italian leather to a recognized name in interior design and contract furniture. Today, it operates from San Zenone degli Ezzelini in the province of Treviso, blending traditional craftsmanship with modern innovation to create durable, aesthetically pleasing products.Founded by a businesswoman and an entrepreneur passionate about Italian leather, Real Piel began as a supplier of upholstery materials, promoting Italy’s renowned tanning traditions on a global scale. The company’s early focus was on sourcing and distributing the finest Italian leather for interior design projects. In 2013, it relocated to San Zenone degli Ezzelini, marking a new phase of growth. By 2016, Real Piel expanded into designing and producing original furniture, particularly seating solutions like armchairs, sofas, and office chairs. In 2018, it launched its own furniture collection under the brand name REAL PIEL RP, emphasizing customizable, high-quality designs. Real Piel offers a diverse range of products and services, all rooted in its expertise in leather and craftsmanship. Upholstery Materials: The company provides genuine Italian leather, eco-leather, and fabrics, including specialized materials like netting for office chair backs. These are sourced from Italy’s top tanneries, known for their softness, durability, and rich textures. Seating Solutions: Under the REAL PIEL RP brand, Real Piel designs and manufactures customizable seating options, including: Armchairs Sofas Office chairs. Interior Design and Contract Projects: Real Piel serves both individual clients and large-scale projects, offering tailored solutions for interior designers, furniture showrooms, and manufacturers.

Name: Stu's Home Improvement Outlet
Description:
Stu’s Home Improvement Outlet | Big Savings. Bigger Mission.

Stu’s Home Improvement Outlet is more than just a discount store — we’re a mission-driven retail operation with a purpose.

We sell brand-new and open-box home improvement items at steep discounts, including furniture, flooring, lighting, vanities, appliances, tools, and more. From scratch-and-dent refrigerators to premium flooring deals, our inventory is constantly changing — but our mission stays the same:

Proceeds from every purchase help fund critical home repairs, wheelchair ramps, and housing support for veterans, domestic violence survivors, and families rebuilding from crisis.

Based in Dubuque, Iowa, Stu’s serves as the retail arm of Restoration Works, a nonprofit dedicated to emergency home stabilization, youth mentorship, addiction recovery, and reentry support. Our store offers both value to the community and opportunity for those seeking a second chance at meaningful employment.

What We Offer:
Major retail discounts — up to 90% off retail pricing
Name-brand items, open box, liquidation, and donations
Consignment and donation programs for tools and furniture
 Local pickup, delivery, and small-item shipping options
 Community-focused service and veteran-centered giving

Who We Hire:
We believe in building people. Our team includes veterans, returning citizens, young adults, and others seeking mentorship and a path forward. We provide on-the-job training, cross-training, and leadership opportunities in a zero-drama, high-energy environment.

Shop Smart. Support Local. Restore Hope.

Name: Bentley Bioethanol Fires
Description:
UK Supplier for Planika Bioethanol Fires | Net Zero | Outdoor Fires | Gas Fires | Electric Fires | TV Media Surrounds

Modern Fireplaces Solutions
Our mission is to give you modern fireplaces that are safe, convenient and easy to arrange in any space. Over the years we have developed innovative BEV technology that allowed us to fully automate the entire burning process in our flagship ethanol fireplaces. These appliances represent an ultimate real fire solution for every interior.

Automatic Fire
We offer covers advanced bioethanol, gas and electric technologies for both indoor and outdoor spaces. Our solutions are based on automatic features ensuring comfort of use, maximum safety and of course… the most natural golden flames. Explore our offer and choose your perfect modern fireplace.

People Are Our Greatest Asset
We believe that people are our most important resource. We also believe that supporting their universal rights, dignity and personal development will create additional space for creativity and pro-ecological initiatives. We want to take steps towards protecting our planet and we are always willing to implement ideas along these lines.

Create Mood and Atmosphere
When the evening comes, the small things can turn into strong accents. In the dark, modern fireplaces will create vibrant lighting and a cosy atmosphere. Our fireplaces are nearly maintenance-free, allowing you to fully enjoy the time of relaxation.

WE ARE ECO
The problem of air pollution is particularly important to us. BEV technology developed by Planika presents the only eco friendly fireplaces on the market. Our ethanol fireplaces are fuelled with renewable energy source – bioethanol made from crops – and do not emit access CO, smoke, soot, ash or any hazardous gasses . The burning process is neutral and complies with the net zero policy. BEV technology ensures that only ethanol vapour is being burned which makes the whole process more efficient. 

Our Team are happy to chat more on this.

Name: Collective Form
Description:
Collective Form (based in West Hollywood, California) connects architects, interior designers and developers with Europe’s most celebrated furniture, lighting and home furnishing luxury brands.

Our principals, Aden Lima and Will Nguyen, have an intimate knowledge of the high-end North American luxury market and its operations. Complete, end-to-end customer satisfaction is our mission.

Will Nguyen has exclusively represented global luxury brands and has extensive experience working with highly exacting clientele. Before co-founding Collective Form, Will managed and opened new showrooms in the west coast for Moura Starr International. Prior to that, he worked at Ralph Pucci International, assisting with the opening of the west coast division and expanding their footprint with key design accounts. Will began his career with Williams-Sonoma, after graduating from the University of Texas at Austin.

Aden Lima got his start in Brazil managing the quality control of the factory as well as the international accounts. He then relocated to Los Angeles where he was Operations Manager for Moura Starr International for six years. With a ground-level expertise in the global premium furniture market, Aden works with clients to ensure the placement, on-time delivery, and quality of their orders.

Name: International Home Furnishings Representatives Association (IHFRA)
Description:
IHFRA's purpose is to empower, support and advocate for it's members in the home furnishings industry.					


Founded in Chicago by a group of insightful sales representatives who understood the value of sharing common goals, communication, education, professionalism, and ethical behavior, IHFRA was originally launched as the National Wholesale Representatives Association in 1934.

The concept of a venue encouraging home furnishings sales representatives from across the country to benefit from each other’s immense knowledge and experience was an immediate hit; membership quickly became national and then international, prompting the group to rechristen itself as the International Home Furnishings Representatives Association.

While the group’s name changed, the core values are still cornerstones of IHFRA today and serve as the foundation that allows IHFRA to promote the professionalism, productivity, prestige, and profitability of today’s home furnishings representatives.

Name: Beck Objekteinrichtungen GmbH
Description:
BECK - Räume fürs Wir

Wir planen und gestalten Arbeitswelten nach den Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden. Mit Innenarchitektur und hochwertigen Möblierungen sorgen wir dafür, dass Mitarbeitende zufrieden und effektiv arbeiten können und schaffen damit Büroumgebungen, in denen Menschen gerne zusammenarbeiten. Seit 1984 sind wir als Familienunternehmen ein beständiger Partner für Unternehmen des Ruhrgebiets und NRWs.

Ausgehend vom Vertrieb, der Auftragsabwicklung, über die Planung bis hin zur Logistik mit angestellten Fachmonteuren und dem eigenen Fuhrpark, bis hin zum Marketing bündeln wir alle Kompetenzen unter einem Dach. 

Unser Unternehmen aktuell bis auf 72 Mitarbeitende gewachsen. Das Familienunternehmen wurde von Alfred Ebing und Thomas Sprink übernommen, die es unter dem Gründungsnamen weiterführen – bis heute.

WERTE 
nach denen wir zusammenarbeiten

1. Soziale Verantwortung
Wir übernehmen Verantwortung für unsere Mitarbeiter und Partner. Voraussetzung dafür ist, dass wir uns gegenseitig mit Wertschätzung und Respekt begegnen. Ziel ist es, unsere soziale Verantwortung im betrieblichen und gesellschaftlichen Umfeld weiter zu entwickeln und nachhaltig zu wirtschaften.

2. Lust auf Neues
Wir bleiben neugierig, sind mutig und begegnen Herausforderungen mit Flexibilität, Innovation und Risikobereitschaft.

3. Spaß
Mit einer gehörigen Portion Spaß und Leidenschaft erreichen wir unsere Ziele. Dabei lachen wir gemeinsam, unterstützen uns gegenseitig und vertrauen auf unsere Stärken.

4. Loyalität
Verlässlichkeit und Tradition verwurzeln uns mit dem Ruhrgebiet. Unser familiärer Umgang verbindet uns nicht nur in guten, sondern auch in schlechten Zeiten.

5. Vertrauen
Vertrauen ist in unserem Unternehmen eine Grundvoraussetzung und Basis, um die uns gestellten Aufgaben zuverlässig und mit hoher Qualität zu erledigen.

Description:

DIRECT IMPORT

Sourcing Solutions also sources and develops licensed and private label products for national brand wholesalers, retailers and mail order companies. Description:

Vstorks is a trusted exporter of Wood & Wicker Furniture, Water Hyacinths, Wood Deck Tiles, and Handicrafts. In 2018, Vstorks (Outdoor Furniture and Handicrafts Supplier) was founded by a dynamic and young team with the mission is to provide high-quality products from our most trusted Vietnamese manufacturers and traditional craft villages to wholesales importers around the world at competitive prices. By this way, we could bring more jobs for Vietnamese farmers as well as improve their lives. Let's be with me to make dreams come true!

 Our Products
Vstorks currently focuses on four main categories including Wicker Furniture, Wooden Furniture, Water Hyacinth, and Rattan & Bamboo Handicrafts. In addition, we provide customized designs to suit your merchandise plans. Recently, we added "Flooring Deck Tiles" as the newest product in our ecosystem. 

Our home and décor products have been exported to over 20 countries and regions in America, Europe, Australia, and Southeast Asia. As an international company with offices in the U.S. and Vietnam, our dedicated staff of professionals is ready to provide product information and respond to your requests effectively and quickly. 

 Core Values:
 Vstorks (standing for Vietnamese Storks like the nursey fable of magical birds who deliver precious goods) who are obsessed with bringing high-quality, village-style rattan items and wooden products made in Vietnam to the global marketplace and consumers.
Our company values have driven our decisions and operations since day one, and we are incredibly proud to deliver high quality products and excellent service. As we continue to serve our customers and work to build a trusted company, it’s equally important that we consistently deliver on our commitments.

The décor in our interior spaces tells the stories of our lives. Reflecting the memories we cherish, the pursuits we enjoy, our family history and all the things that interest or matter to us. At Authentic Models, we combine the two through elegantly handcrafted furniture, objects and ornaments which capture the essence of an era or interest via meaningful and surprising design. Inspired by the adventurous spirit which led to many ingenious creations, our collections celebrate travel, exploration and endeavour. To complement the pieces which thoughtfully represent the past, we also create original new designs with a daring contemporary twist. Our Commitment to You:

Experience personalized and uninterrupted service for storage organizing products, available 365 days a year. Our dedicated team is committed to understanding your unique needs and offering continuous support throughout the organizing journey.

2. Expert Guidance:
From assessing your requirements to implementing efficient storage solutions, our team is available round the clock to answer queries and provide expert advice. We are your partners in creating well-organized living or working spaces.

3. Seamless Organizing Experience:

Join hands with TY Storage, and let's explore opportunities together. As your trusted partner in home storage, we are dedicated to helping you win the market with top-notch solutions. Welcome to a world where organization meets innovation, every day of the year.

Name: Decorglass
Description:
Fundada em 1984, a Decorglass está situada na cidade de Pedreira, no interior do estado de São Paulo, num pavilhão de 10.000m², onde trabalham 50 funcionários e tem capacidade industrial instalada para gerar até 300.000 peças por mês.  

A Decor Glass produz além de diversos produtos em vidro, peças para decoração, móveis e utilidades de madeira, concreto e ferro.

Importamos produtos da ÁSIA onde buscamos versatilidade, novidades e acima de tudo qualidade.

Começamos nossa empresa fabricando o vidro, que de todos os materiais conhecidos e utilizados pelo homem, é um dos mais antigos e de todos os métodos, o "fusingglass" é também um dos mais antigos e raros.

A Decor Glass é a primeira empresa brasileira a produzir em escala industrial com essa técnica milenar, que antes era privilégio dos artesãos.

O grande trunfo da Decor Glass é a flexibilidade de desenvolver itens de acordo com a necessidade de cada cliente. Os produtos têm uma característica especial de "feito à mão", o que lhe proporciona a vantagem de ter sempre uma peça "única" e exclusiva.

A Decorglass está presente nas principais feiras do segmento proporcionando aos seus clientes excelentes oportunidades de compras e negócios.

Temos representantes disponíveis em todo o território nacional para o melhor atendimento aos nossos clientes.

Nosso showroom é reformulado com todos os lançamentos e tendências e está localizado na cidade de Pedreira, onde o seu atendimento é exclusivo, o que garante mais conforto e agilidade na hora de fazer o seu pedido.

Nosso objetivo com a nova loja virtual é estreitar nosso relacionamento, facilitando a compra para nossos clientes com praticidade e segurança.

Müşterilerimizin olumlu geri bildirimleri kalitemizi tanımlar. Ürünlerimizin montajı kolaydır, bu da ambalaj hacmini en aza indirerek ihracat maliyetini düşürür.

Mobilyalarımızı özel konutlardan cafe, restoran ve otel gibi halka açık alanlara kadar geniş bir yelpazede sunuyoruz. Mimarlarımız ile birlikte malzeme, renk ve ölçü detaylarını değerlendiriyoruz.

5A tasarım ekibi, sürdürülebilirlik, pratiklik ve teknolojiyi göz önünde bulundurarak çeşitli kültürleri sentezlemeyi hedefliyor. En büyük motivasyonumuz, gelecek nesillerin sevdiği eşsiz 5A ürünleri ile yolumuza devam etmektir.

Name: ILLA SAS
Description:
Il Nostro Inizio
Fondata nel 2017 come Daucus Sas, derivata dalla consolidata Arli Spa nel dinamico contesto di Milano, la nostra azienda ha iniziato il suo viaggio nell’illuminotecnica offrendo servizi di consulenza e progettazione. Specializzati in contratti e forniture di corpi illuminanti, ci avvaliamo di un know-how ventennale per guidare i nostri clienti attraverso ogni sfaccettatura della luce.
La Nostra Evoluzione
Nel corso degli anni, la nostra vision e mission aziendale hanno subito un’evoluzione significativa, portandoci a trasformarci in Illa Sas. Con questo cambio di identità, abbiamo anche compiuto un passo audace e strategico: trasferire la nostra sede da Milano a Laveno, il cuore pulsante della ceramica italiana. Questa mossa non solo segna un nuovo capitolo nella nostra storia ma ci avvicina anche alle radici di uno dei nostri principali prodotti di interessa: la ceramica lavenese.
La Nostra Mission
 
Il nostro punto vendita a Laveno rappresenta una finestra sul mondo della ricerca nel design di interni e nella storica ceramica lavenese. Qui, la tradizione incontra l’innovazione: ogni pezzo racconta una storia di artigianato, design e passione. La nostra selezione di lampade, complementi d’arredo e ceramiche esprime un connubio unico tra estetica e funzionalità, pensato per coloro che cercano nell’arredo non solo un oggetto di design ma un vero e proprio pezzo di arte.
In Illa Sas, crediamo nel potere del design di trasformare gli spazi e migliorare la vita delle persone. La nostra esperienza e la nostra passione ci guidano nella scelta di prodotti che rispecchiano i valori di bellezza, qualità, tradizione e innovazione.

L’interazione con una filiera completa di fornitori italiani, permette di realizzare prodotti di altissima qualità nel pieno rispetto delle tempistiche e dei budget del progetto.

Name: erthouse
Description:
Welcome to erthouse (est. 2025) a place where you can be surprised by 20th century pieces. Our collection has been put together with sensitivity where we not only offer pieces from well-known makers but also anonymous objects with a distinctive character. We both truly enjoy the thrill of discovering the perfect mid-century design pieces from around the world, often when we least expect it — those items that add a unique character to every space. Equally rewarding is our commitment to ensuring that our clients have the best possible experience, guiding them from the moment they show interest all the way through to far beyond the delivery. It’s this blend of passion for design and dedication to exceptional service that drives everything we do at erthouse.

We firmly believe in the transformative power of human connection and the profound impact that thoughtfully chosen objects can have on our lives. Our vision is to enrich our customers by offering furniture that is not only visually captivating but also infused with history and significance. These objects are not mere decorations—they are vessels of memory, culture, and emotion that resonate with those who choose them, becoming a part of their living spaces.

Our commitment to delivering an exceptional customer experience is at the heart of everything we do, ensuring that our service reflects the same care, quality, and attention to detail as the objects we offer. 

We take great pride in fostering lasting relationships built on trust, understanding, and exceptional service. erthouse aims to create more than just transactions; we seek to cultivate connections, inspire meaningful exchanges. From the moment you engage with us, our priority is to ensure that every step of your journey is seamless, personalized, and rewarding.

It is hard to meet the development of online sellers, as they are tired of low-price competition. And because we have better optimized the process and professional design team, we can serve the online sellers better with wholesale flat packing furniture, so we set up the brand HOMVND.

We supply industrial furniture for wholesale with flat-pack designs from home garden to entryway, from the living room to bedroom, and from the kitchen to the bathroom.

Suppose you need wholesale a wide range of industrial furniture and various popular designs with a small trial order. Wat ons uniek maakt? De productie gebeurt door mensen met een afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt. Zo creëren we niet alleen een mooi product, maar ook kansen voor iedereen.
Onze collectie bestaat uit:

Luxe zitzakken voor binnen en buiten, in diverse kleuren en formaten.
Kinderzitzakken: speels, stevig en perfect voor de kleintjes.
Outdoor zitzakken: waterafstotend en weerbestendig, ideaal voor tuin of terras.
Custom designs: wil je een zitzak in jouw huisstijl of met een logo? Wij maken het mogelijk.

Met Zitzak & Co kies je voor comfort, stijl én een betere wereld. Samen maken we afval waardevol en mensen sterker.

Je kunt bijvoorbeeld de stoffen van de hoek- en bankstellen die je mooi vindt bij Advena Home naar  wens kiezen; je kunt de afmetingen ervan aanpassen aan de grootte van je ruimte. Je hoeft het  slaapkamermeubel dat je mooi vindt niet te kopen zoals je het ziet, je kunt bijvoorbeeld de grootte  van de kledingkast in de set vergroten of verkleinen. Als je de keukentafel / stoelenset of  eetkamersets met jouw droomontwerp ziet, kun je er een eigen touch aan toevoegen en de kleur en  afmetingen ervan veranderen. 

Bij Advena Home is de grens alleen uw verbeelding. U ziet het, u vindt het mooi, u vertelt uw wensen  en dromen, wij brengen alle veranderingen aan en zorgen voor een veilige levering en installatie bij u  thuis. 

Laten we het keer op keer zeggen: Jullie zijn heel waardevol voor ons. Bedankt dat u ons een plaats  geeft in uw huis, in uw meest bijzondere omgeving. 

Met onze liefde.

Onze tafels worden lokaal vervaardigd en zijn gemaakt van duurzaam hout. Dat gebeurt in onze moderne fabriek in het zuiden van Nederland. Onze 40 meubelmakers hebben oog voor detail en zetten zich dagelijks in om jouw unieke droomtafel te realiseren. We werken met de nieuwste machines om zeker te zijn van de allerbeste kwaliteit.

Bij Forme vinden wij het belangrijk om een bijdrage te leveren aan een beter klimaat. Dat doen we op verschillende manieren. Zo werken we niet alleen met duurzaam hout, maar proberen we ook het aantal logistieke bewegingen te minimaliseren. Bovendien maken wij gebruik van zonnepanelen, werken we met recyclebaar verpakkingsmateriaal én planten wij voor iedere twee tafels die we verkopen een boom terug.

Con la llegada del nuevo milenio, en una búsqueda de especialización, y con el fin último de mejorar la atención a nuestros clientes, nace MOBILUS 2000. Esta nueva empresa estará dedicada a satisfacer de una forma más eficiente el mercado del mueble de hogar.

Name: Frislev
Description:
A company with soul for good design, sound, & experience.

A bit of history from 2005
Frislev is a Danish company that was established in 2005. At that time, the selection of shelving with room for hi-fi and pulling cables in shelving was limited. With experience from the radio industry and knowledge of customer installations, Claus Frislev developed a design that had to be minimalist and at the same time strong enough to hold the heavy amplifiers and speakers that had to be hidden behind fabric doors. This concept quickly took off and was sold in stores in both Denmark and Norway.


A bit of history from 2011
In 2011, the first of Frislev's built-in speakers were manufactured in the shelves. As a musician, Claus noticed that the sound from the good speakers changed significantly when placed behind fabric doors in a bookcase. Loudspeakers are not exactly designed and adapted for this location. We could clearly hear the difference as our speakers were now adapted to be in the bookcase. Now we really had something that was wife-friendly with good sound :-)

Frislev Libra - Concentus Eight Surround/Atmos - Sound System
A bit of history from 2019
In 2019, we entered into a collaboration with some of Denmark's most talented sound engineers, who had helped develop well-known high-end brands. We had two systems developed: Concentus Two (C2), which only plays stereo, and Concentus Eight (C8), which can both play stereo and expand to full Dolby Atmos. Everything was carefully measured and adjusted.

The most important thing in the process was using our ears: Do the instruments sound right? After a few adjustments, we achieved great results. The systems should also be able to be used with Google Home and Apple Home and be able to stream music up to 24 bit/192 kHz.

2024
This year we will begin a journey and we are looking forward to show you what we have been working on.

Name: UnderItAll: Custom Scissorless Rug Pads
Description:
We are the originators and inventors of Perforated Rug Pads. With two patents pending our process and unique products deliver the fastest rug and rug pad installation you will ever have. No scissors are required. To Trim ,You simply peel and walk the perforation for a fast and clean fit every time.

We are a to-the-trade only company accessible to designers, architects, and specifiers. We solved a universal problem. Whether you're trimming rug pads yourself or hiring someone to do your installation, Nobody likes cutting rug pads. NOBODY!

The rug pad world is filled with too many choices. We curate and specify our products mill-direct our rug pads stand out and are the only pads specifically curated for high profile design installations. Your choices are simple Thick (Luxe) or Thin (Luxe Lite)

Click Ship and Rip-Registering for your trade account takes less than 2 minutes. All orders are placed online. You tell us Thick or Thin, the shape (Rectangle, Round or Square) and enter the exact size of your rug.  We cut the pad 2" shorter on the length and width then add the two 1-inch perforations on the length and width. This is your insurance incase the label is incorrect or the rug is crooked, bowed, or just not quite perpendicular. Hint: this is about 90% of the time.

Now for the best part, we don't fold and roll pads like the other guys. We loosely fold every pad and box your order. This process eliminates dreaded Oversized charges.

Your order will be cut and shipped the same day we receive it. We use UPS and provide immediate tracking. Most orders arrive in 2 days (East Coast) or 3-to 4 days to the West Coast. If you are within a 170-mile radius of Atlanta you will get your product in 1 day. Take that Amazon!

When your box arrives it will be clearly marked. We place a receiver report label identifying the Project, the sizes of the pads, and the exact placement location( bedroom, kitchen) of your install.

Please join us and experience The UIA difference

- Nordholm Products:

- Nordholm radiators for bathrooms and apartments
Our Nordholm radiators can be divided into two categories: bathroom radiators and design radiators. The bathroom radiators provide cozy warmth in your bathroom whenever you need it - so you can get straight out of the warm shower into a preheated room. It is even better if your towel is already preheated: hang it on the radiator where it is easily accessible or use a special towel warmer.

The Nordholm design radiators look particularly good in the bathroom, kitchen, hallway and co. and combine powerful heat output with an unusual form factor. With a design radiator, you are securing very special Nordholm products for your house or apartment.

Other Nordholm products for the bathroom
With Nordholm products, you can furnish your bathroom according to your wishes. Add a handy splashboard to the shower, install electric underfloor heating under the tiles to keep your feet warm even in winter, or find the right combination of LED bathroom mirror and sink to start and end your day with. We also have a special vanity combination for hotel bathrooms in which your guests can store all their personal hygiene necessities and amenities.

All of our Nordholm products are of course available in the usual quality for your home. Also take a look at our catalogs and brochures before you make your choice.

Name: Goesten & Goesten Horeca-& Projectinrichting Nederland en Belgie
Description:
Horeca projectinrichting
Met een krachtig horeca interieur creëren wij de ultieme gastbeleving

Een slimme projectinrichting van uw horecazaak is van doorslaggevend belang voor een succesvolle horeca onderneming. Een krachtig concept gaat een stuk verder dan alleen een paar leuke stoelen neerzetten en een verfje kiezen. De juiste keuzes zorgen ervoor dat u een ware beleving creëert in uw horeca zaak. Een ervaring waar over gesproken wordt, die uw gasten bij blijft. Elk klein dingetje kan ervoor zorgen dat u meer klanten aantrekt en ze vaker terugkomen. Maar naast sfeer moet uw horeca inrichting ook praktisch zijn, voor zowel gasten als uw personeel. Kortom; een succesvolle horeca projectinrichting vraagt om een specialist die u helpt om ieder facet exact af te stemmen op uw wensen en eisen.

Horeca is ons met de paplepel ingegoten. Goesten en Goesten is niet voor niets ontstaan uit liefde voor deze branche en dit vak. Doordat wij ons thuis voelen in de horeca, weten we als geen ander wat er belangrijk is om een ultieme beleving te realiseren voor de gasten van cafés en restaurants. We weten dat inrichting en aankleding hét verschil kan maken.

Bij het inrichten van een horecazaak komt heel wat kijken. Als spin in het web zorgen wij ervoor dat de volledige horeca projectinrichting tot in de puntjes wordt gerealiseerd. Benieuwd hoe wij ook uw horeca onderneming naar een hoger niveau kunnen tillen? Neem dan contact op voor een vrijblijvend kennismakingsgesprek in onze zeer ruime showrooms.
Zowel in Nederland als België staat de koffie klaar!

Bienvenue chez Axel Mobilier, votre spécialiste en mobilier professionnel pour l'hôtellerie et la restauration à Genève, Suisse. Depuis 1984, nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions de mobilier de haute qualité, adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients.

Notre Expertise :

Spécialisation en Hôtellerie et Restauration : Nous comprenons les exigences uniques de ces secteurs et proposons des solutions sur mesure pour créer des espaces accueillants et fonctionnels.
Suivi de Projet Complet : De la conception initiale à l'installation finale, nous vous accompagnons à chaque étape pour garantir que votre projet se déroule sans accroc.

Pourquoi Choisir Axel Mobilier ?

Expérience et Savoir-Faire : Avec plus de trois décennies d'expérience, nous avons acquis une expertise inégalée dans le domaine du mobilier professionnel.
Qualité et Durabilité : Nous sélectionnons rigoureusement nos fournisseurs pour vous offrir des produits durables et de haute qualité.
Service Personnalisé : Chaque projet est unique. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec vous pour comprendre vos besoins et vous proposer des solutions adaptées.

Contactez-Nous :
Nous serions ravis de discuter de votre projet et de voir comment nous pouvons vous aider à créer un espace qui reflète votre vision.

 Email : contact@axel-sa.ch
 Téléphone : 022 782 44 40

Rejoignez-nous sur LinkedIn pour rester informé de nos dernières réalisations et des tendances du secteur. Nous sommes impatients de collaborer avec vous !

Name: The Weavers Tales
Description:
Curating a platform to bring social progress through the root of our country. Our brand “The Weavers Tales” is a celebration of old age crafts, handed down through generations. Every product is intricately crafted by skilled artisans who pour their heart and soul into creating comfort and bringing our heritage to your homes.

At The Weavers Tales, we believe in the power of consumerism. Sustainability is at the core of everything we do. We embrace the beliefs of recycling and re purposing fabrics to create a new aesthetic for your comfort and better living. Indulging into Eco-friendly practices, we are paving the way for a sustainable future.

In addition, we are dedicated to empowering women by providing them the opportunity for skill development and financial independence. We actively engage with our artisans, providing them with training in sewing, stitching and handwork skills. By choosing our products you become a part of this journey of transformation and empowerment.

Stepping into the world, where every thread tells a story, every design sparks, and every purchase makes a difference. Let our products breathe life into your living spaces, infusing them with the warmth of human touch and the vibrancy of cultural heritage.

The Weavers Tales: Crafting sustainable heritage

Already, our products have earned recognition and trust from a growing client base. Looking ahead, we remain committed to offering high-value, cost-effective furniture backed by reliable after-sales support. In addition, we are partnering with smart technology enterprises to provide enhanced solutions for both current and future clients—a testament to our proactive and visionary approach.

As we advance, BEIJING SELLING aims to integrate intelligent manufacturing into our operations, striving to bring quality furniture to a broader global audience and meet the demands of diverse consumer groups.

Name: Amity Home
Description:
What began as a dream in 1997 with 10 quilts and no shams, has grown into an international, multi-category industry leader.  Each year we strive to improve upon the last in all areas of life and business.  Here at Amity Home we are committed to providing you a quality product, impeccably designed, with tools to ensure your success. 

Just as in the kitchen, ingredients and skill are key to the finished product, Amity Home uses natural materials such as cotton, linen, silk, viscose and wool to create the textiles in our line.  The use of natural materials offers a breathable sleeping experience, and an heirloom quality piece.  The majority of our collection has been pre-washed and is washable for easy care. Each Amity Home item is produced by skilled artisans and inspected thoroughly before being carefully packed and shipped.

The design team works year-round collecting inspiration, finding just the right pattern, and testing details to bring you the best of the best. Amity Home offers a wide variety of styles from Casual to Elegant; Basics to Showstoppers and much in between. Each collection is sold a la carte, and easily mixed and matched so you can build your own unique look.  Prefer to point and click?  Our design and merchandising team have thoughtfully assembled many Inspirational Sets for you to select from.  With categories including Bedding, Accents, Curtains and Rugs, Amity Home has every category that you need to ensure all the textiles in your bedroom project resonate well together.  

We are available to you every day in the office and attend 8 trade shows a year where the entire line is available to you as a resource for your current and future projects.

Name: Aleda Stone
Description:
ALEDA STONE Easy Shelf rappresenta una vera novità nel campo delle mensole angolari. Grazie al suo innovativo metodo di montaggio a scomparsa, può essere fissata alle pareti con estrema semplicità anche dai meno esperti di bricolage.

La nostra passione costituisce la chiave che ci consente di raggiungere i nostri obiettivi. La voglia di migliorare ci spinge alla continua ricerca di soluzioni innovative destinate a una clientela sempre più esigente. Ecco perché i nostri prodotti sono considerati un dettaglio di classe.

L’attenzione alla qualità e ai particolari ci contraddistingue in ogni fase della produzione – che inizia con la scelta dei materiali direttamente nelle cave e prosegue con la trasformazione dei blocchi per giungere alla realizzazione del prodotto finito. Tutto ciò avviene mediante l’utilizzo di macchinari di nostra proprietà, caratterizzati da un’elevata componente tecnologica.
