Name: Kayoom GmbH
Description:
Die Lalee-Gruppe: Ihr Erfolgsrezept für Teppiche und Home & Deko im E-Commerce!

Willkommen bei Kayoom GmbH, Teil der Lalee-Gruppe, führend in maßgeschneiderten Teppichen seit 35 Jahren. Wir sind ein bedeutender Name in Europa mit über 250 Mitarbeitern in Düren und 2500 weltweit. Unser Fokus liegt auf Online-Teppichhandel und der Verknüpfung von Großhandel, Einzelhandel und E-Commerce.

Unsere Stärken sind tiefes Branchenwissen und eine riesige Teppichkollektion von 3,5 Millionen Quadratmetern. Dazu bieten wir Home & Deko auf 50.000 Paletten auf 40.000 Quadratmetern Lagerfläche.

Unsere Kayoom B2Bc Full-Service Multichannel Solutions ermöglichen es, 20.500 Artikel ohne Vorfinanzierung anzubieten, und schaffen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für den stationären Handel. Unsere Teams unterstützen Partner mit Technik, Marketing und Produktpräsentation.

Unsere Erfolgsgeschichte wächst, von etablierten Baumärkten bis zu Online-Händlern. Wir steigern Umsatz und Effizienz.

Bald unterstützen wir Content Creators & Künstler im Back-End, von Webdesign bis zum Versand. Kayoom GmbH - Ihr Erfolgspartner im E-Commerce für Teppiche und Home & Deko! Gemeinsam in eine erfolgreiche Zukunft.

Name: Mano Helsinki
Description:
Mano Helsinki is a specialist in importing contract furniture from continental Europe.
 
Our primary area of interest is Italian, Spanish, and French manufacturers. We aim to provide Finnish customers with links to companies that do not yet have a presence in Finland. We cooperate with the best professionals, and all the manufacturers we work with have been hand-selected. Mano Helsinki works only with companies dedicated to their work—like Mattiazzi, whom we represent in Finland.
 
Mano's portfolio includes design-driven brands, including Mattiazzi, Hem, Fogia, Man of Parts, Arco, cc-tapis, Artifort, Tacchini, Zilio A&C, B-line, Chairs & More, Prostoria, Crassevig, Capdell, Ton, Parla, Ondarreta, Arrmet, Inclass, Noti, Massproductions, Dumoffice, Kristalia, Torre, and many more.
 
Together with our network, we strive to create aesthetically beautiful, functional interiors. We offer customised and cost-effective solutions for hotels, restaurants, hospitals, lounges, cruise ships, offices, schools, etc. 
 
Mano Helsinki is determined to work more sustainably in cooperation with the brands we represent. We are aligned with the social sustainability standards of the future and present.

Name: Roua Doors
Description:
Povestea noastră a început din dorința de a oferi produse de calitate superioară la un preț avantajos, adaptate nevoilor pieței și tendințelor moderne. În ultimii 2 ani, ne-am specializat pe uși interioare, exterioare, glisante și ascunse, introducând tehnologii avansate care ne permit să creăm soluții inovatoare și durabile.

- Ne străduim să asigurăm nu doar funcționalitate, ci și estetică, folosind o gamă variată de materiale și accesorii care să îmbine perfect designul modern cu nevoile practice ale clienților noștri. 

- Oferim prețuri sub media pieței, asigurându-ne că partenerii noștri beneficiază de cea mai bună valoare pentru produse de înaltă calitate.

- Folosim tehnologii de ultimă generație în procesul de producție, pentru a crea uși moderne, durabile și adaptate tendințelor actuale.

- Cu peste 20 de ani în domeniul designului interior, aducem cunoștințe și expertiză în fiecare proiect, garantând produse care îmbină funcționalitatea cu estetica.

Name: SunBase
Description:
In the midst of the Covid era, when we were all just hanging out at home, the spark for SunBase lit up!
We were on the hunt for a cool, wheeled parasol base, but everything out there was either an eyesore or crazy expensive. So, we thought, "Why not create our own, with a little extra flair?”

Our entire crew is soaking up the sun down here in the South of France, near the dreamy Mediterranean Sea.
We practically live outdoors, and that's what fuelled us to cook up SunBase – your ticket to bringing indoor coziness outside.

Oh, and get this – three of our buddies are ex-Apple wizards.
You know what that means? The Sunbase experience is all about giving you the VIP treatment. We're crossing our fingers that you'll vibe with your SunBase just as much as we do!
 
Cheers to making outdoor living a breeze!

Vision:
To be the fabric industry leader in innovation, creativity, and sustainability, while delivering exceptional value and service to our customers.

Mission:
We are passionate about designing and delivering innovative and sustainable fabric solutions that enhance the quality of life for our customers. Name: OFFICE DESIGN
Description:
Redéfinissez Votre Espace de Travail avec Style

Chez Office Design, notre mission est de rendre le mobilier de bureau design et un service personnalisé accessibles à toutes les entreprises. Notre parcours a commencé avec un showroom physique impressionnant, mais nous avons choisi l'innovation : la vente en ligne. Ainsi, nous proposons des tarifs compétitifs sans compromettre la qualité.

Avec le temps, nous avons établi des partenariats solides avec des fournisseurs réputés et des designers talentueux. Notre catalogue offre une gamme complète de mobilier de bureau design, alliant esthétisme, fonctionnalité et durabilité.

Notre équipe guide la création d'un espace de travail personnalisé, consciente de son impact sur votre productivité et votre image. Depuis 10 ans, nous concevons des espaces professionnels uniques. Votre succès est le nôtre, et nous innovons sans cesse, redéfinissant les normes du design de bureau.

Avec Office Design, qualité et service client inégalé sont garantis. Définissons ensemble l'espace de travail et d'accueil, pour un futur productif et inspirant.

#DesignDeBureau #EspacesDeTravail #Innovation

Over the years, CONTERIORS has established a very close personal relationships with a broad spectrum of Italian companies and factories. This allows us to serve our clients at all budgetary levels. Rather than be limited to offering a single product line, we are able to offer an array of possible choices.
Regardless of the scale of the project, we at CONTERIORS take care with the same attention to each stage of the project. Thanks to a well-established project management process, the workflow is constantly monitored to ensure the expected quality and compliance with deadlines and costs.
CONTERIORS combines design and manufacturing excellence. 
With attention to detail and production of high-quality product, we can handle the delivery and installation of retail stores, shop-in-shop stores, flagship stores, outlets, hospitality projects, restaurants, lobby spaces, public spaces, residential homes and commercial projects. Name: Gm Design
Description:
GM Design is een handelsnaam. De belangrijkste activiteit is WoodStock panelen. 

WoodStock panelen heeft zich gespecialiseerd in het leveren van massief houten panelen op maat. 

Massieve panelen. Hoe werkt het:
Via onze handige product-configuratie op onze website bestelt u eenvoudig elke gewenste maat tot 3500mm lengte.
Er is keuze uit meerdere houtsoorten, diktes en kwaliteiten. 
U betaalt uitsluitend de vierkante meters die u afneemt. U heeft dus geen afval en voordeel in uw productietijd. 

Levertijd panelen:
Wij gaan pas laten produceren als u de order inzendt.
De levertijd is daarom 2 à 3 weken.

Kant en klare tafelbladen:
U kunt bij ons kant en klare tafelbladen op maat en in elke gewenste vorm bestellen.
Wij voorzien de bladen van ijzers en zaagsneden aan de onderkant. De rand heeft een mooie radius. 
De bladen zijn zodanig geschuurd zodat u ze alleen nog maar hoeft te kleuren.
Indien gewenst kunnen we de bladen laten verjongen of opdikken. Ook elke andere CNC bewerking is in overleg mogelijk. 
Daarnaast bieden wij de mogelijkheid om het blad af te werken met lak of met Rubio Monocoat. 

Levertijd kant en klare tafels.
Wij gaan pas laten produceren als u de order inzendt.
De levertijd is daarom 4 à 5 weken.

Wij kunnen meer voor u doen dan u denkt.
In samenwerking met verschillende interieurbouwers en meubelmakers hebben we meerdere projecten kunnen realiseren.
U moet hierbij denken aan complete trappen, kubussen, tafelbladen voor restaurants, badkamermeubelen, etc.
Wellicht is het interessant om samen met u een meubellijn op te zetten? Of u te voorzien van massief houten halffabricaten?
Neem gerust contact met ons op. Wij komen graag vrijblijvend met u praten.

Name: Sustainable PillowⓇ British Textile Manufacturers
Description:
We are circular zero waste circular knitting textile manufacturers of luxurious sustainable made sleep products. We regenerate premium orthopaedic memory foam trimmings intended for Scottish and English landfill. Using innovative shredding machine we aerate the foam delivering a mouldable orthopaedic hypoallergenic pillow filling. The fabric that encases the pillow originates as ocean plastic waste that has been transformed into vegan silk which is knitted and filled with new regenerative memory foam. Suitable for children, orthopaedic support and allergy prone sensitive skin.

We can manufacture at scale and create bespoke creations for distributors globally. We are seeking Buyers with our made in Britain products.

We have over 120 years of history within the textile industry, dating back as far as 1902 tailoring for the British Empire in India to present-day manufacturing in Scotland & England.

We use eco-focused materials such as Viscose damask & Polyester silk jersey which begin life as rescued plastic bottles, treated with Oeko-Tex certified non-toxic anti-viral & waterproof coatings. We have maintained a zero waste Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified circular manufacturing supply chain.

Sustainable PillowⓇ made great in Britain.
Manufacturing made-to-order sleep-focused products at scale & export globally.

Name: Bed Republic
Description:
Chez BED REPUBLIC, notre mission est de vous faire profiter de ce qu'il y a de mieux, tout en consommant mieux.

On souhaite faire profiter des meilleurs produits que l'on peut trouver dans une chambre d'hôtel haut de gamme, accessible, durable et sans risques.

Tout cela chez vous, pour vous...

Et on n'y arrive grâce à notre philosophie : confectionner uniquement pour vous, en France et en Europe, des supers produits durables.

À l'origine, c'est l'histoire de 4 amis, qui cherchaient un super bon matelas…

Et se posaient une question de base : ou achète t'on un bon matelas sans pour autant casser son livret A ? On sait pas...

Car dans le commerce, rien ne valait le coup.

C'est toute une histoire cette recherche d'un matelas, c'est même une histoire connue maintenant : "La quête du sommeil parfait". Si vous voulez lire cette histoire, elle est ICI. Parfaite avant de se coucher.

Dans ces 4 personnes, chacun sa spécialité : marketing, vente/supply chain, comptable et produits/qualité.

Sans modestie, oui on s'y connait : avec plus de 15 ans d'expérience dans la grande distribution secteur meuble, On gère. Et un jour on en a eu marre d'entendre toujours la même chose : baisse des couts = baisse qualité du produit, pour toujours vendre plus de produits jetables !

Fallait changer ça.

Description:
BIDA SA est un bureau de design et une entreprise de distribution ,

Nous satisfaisons des clients exigeants, en Suisse et dans d'autres pays européens. Depuis sa création en 2002, BIDA s'est forgé une réputation d'entreprise compétente dans le domaine de l'aménagement de magasins et de la décoration intérieure. 

Des collaborateurs qualifiés et motivés développent des solutions innovantes et clés en main. Nous leur garantissons une interface, un point de contact pour la bonne réalisation de leur projet. Le travail commence par une phase d'analyse et de faisabilité et se poursuit par les phases de planification, de production, d'installation, de mise en service et de service après-vente. 

Chaque membre de notre équipe dispose d'une vaste expérience et de connaissances étendues, spécifiques à son domaine d'activité, dont nos clients profitent directement. En effet, pour chaque projet, nos collaborateurs fournissent des solutions adaptées. Avec l'appui du service informatique, notre bureau d'études et notre service logistique disposent des outils technologiques les plus modernes et peuvent vous garantir un service efficace et polyvalent. Constructions en bois ou en métal, de la production de masse à la réalisation sur mesure, BIDA SA coordonne tous les travaux, de la fabrication à l'installation. La fabrication et le montage sont assurés par un personnel hautement qualifié et se déroulent selon un calendrier défini.

Name: DepoSAN
Description:
At DepoSAN, we are more than just a furniture company; we are innovators and artisans dedicated to crafting seating solutions that embody both style and functionality. Our story began in 1998, and since then, we have been on a mission to exceed expectations and achieve the highest levels of customer satisfaction. 

With a rich history of success and continuous self-improvement, DepoSAN has set ambitious goals year after year, always with our customers’ needs at the forefront. Our product range is a testament to our commitment to innovation, as we consistently monitor both domestic and international trends to ensure a diverse and contemporary selection. 

In-house production is our strength, enabling us to quickly bring trendy designs to life. We listen to the dynamic needs of the sector and integrate valuable feedback from our esteemed customers into our renewal process. The result is a product lineup crafted with devotion, exceptional workmanship, and unwavering quality. 

From metal and wooden chairs to bar stools, ottomans, chesters, and tables, our product groups are designed to cater to every taste and every space. We take pride in adapting our creations to enhance homes, offices, cafes, restaurants, bars, hotels, and all your unique projects, ensuring comfort and elegance in every setting. 

DepoSAN’s reputation for excellence spans the globe, with sales across Turkey and internationally. We partner with reliable transportation companies to ensure seamless product delivery, overseeing every step from pre-order to post-sale support. Our dedication to service extends to product tracking and a solution-oriented approach to any suggestions or issues that may arise. 

While our products can be explored on our website and Instagram account, we also welcome you to visit our showroom and warehouse in Istanbul Ümraniye. Here, you can experience the quality of our products in person.

•	De juiste keuzes maken
Bedden, matrassen en meubilair passend bij de doelgroep, uitstraling én budget.

•	Regelen en opleveren
Logistiek, planning, montage en een nette oplevering zodat u snel kunt openen of verhuren.

Waarom Livendo?
•	Kwaliteit, meubilair dat tegen een stootje kan.
•	Persoonlijk, oprechte aandacht, eerlijk advies, korte lijnen.
•	Ontzorging, van A tot Z geregeld.

Name: B2B Mobili Furniture
Description:
Welcome to B2B-Mobili, your premier destination for revolutionizing workspaces through exquisite wholesale furniture solutions. We are dedicated to empowering businesses with top-notch office furniture that seamlessly blends functionality, elegance, and ergonomic design.

At B2B-Mobili, we understand the significance of a well-designed workspace in fostering productivity and creativity among employees. Our curated collection of wholesale office furniture encompasses a diverse range of cutting-edge desks, chairs, storage units, and collaborative furniture, tailored to meet the unique needs of modern businesses.

With an unwavering commitment to quality, we source our furniture from trusted manufacturers known for their craftsmanship and sustainable practices. From sophisticated executive suites to dynamic open-plan layouts, our furniture is engineered to optimize space, enhance comfort, and inspire collaboration.

Our team of seasoned design experts is here to assist you in crafting bespoke office solutions that reflect your company's ethos and brand identity. Whether you're establishing a startup, expanding your enterprise, or simply revamping your current workspace, B2B-Mobili has the perfect furniture ensemble to elevate your office environment to new heights.

By prioritizing client satisfaction, timely delivery, and unparalleled customer service, we have earned the trust of businesses across industries. As a testament to our commitment to excellence, our furniture is built to withstand the rigors of daily use, ensuring longevity and durability.

Join the ranks of thriving enterprises that have discovered the transformative power of B2B-Mobili's wholesale furniture solutions. Take the first step toward fostering a dynamic and efficient workspace that fosters success and cultivates innovation.

Elevate your workspace. Embrace productivity. Experience success with B2B-Mobili - Where Wholesale Furniture Meets Inspiration.

Name: Acumen Collection
Description:
Welcome to Acumen Collection, providing bespoke, sustainable furniture. We are committed in creating the finest artisanal, sustainable, and enduring products.

Established in 2018 by Michael Farrer, Acumen Collection emerged from a passion for interior design and a dedication to sustainability. Recognising the scarcity of high-quality furniture that could stand as a worthy alternative to mass-produced options, Michael set out to create a brand that combines craftsmanship with a personal touch.

At Acumen Collection, our most cherished asset is our in-house team of highly skilled artisans. With a commitment to quality craftsmanship, all our made-to-measure products are meticulously created in-house in our studio in the beautiful Lake District, Cumbria.

Whether you're furnishing a hotel, restaurant, office, or any other commercial setting, our furniture combines timeless style, exceptional quality, and unmatched craftsmanship to create spaces that leave a lasting impression.

From sophisticated and luxurious pieces to modern and minimalistic designs, our collection offers something for every style preference.

Each piece in our commercial furniture range is handcrafted by our own skilled artisans using the finest materials, ensuring longevity and durability even in high-traffic areas. Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in our use of responsibly sourced materials, allowing you to create beautiful spaces with a clear conscience.

From grand rustic dining tables and elegant chairs to stylish bar stools, our commercial furniture offers a seamless blend of form and function. Whether you're aiming for a contemporary and minimalist atmosphere or a warm and inviting ambiance, our versatile collection allows you to tailor your space to meet your specific needs.

Name: BALU - Bowls & More
Description:
BALU - bowls & more ist ein 'womanowned business' und steht für die Symbiose aus Ästhetik, Nachhaltigkeit & fairem Handel. 
Wir fertigen wunderschöne und qualitativ hochwertige Homeware aus Kokosnüssen und Kokospalmholz, welches eigentlich verbrannt werden würde. 

Da die Verbrennung von Kokosnussschalen & -holz erheblich zur Erhöhung der CO2- und Methanemissionen beiträgt, haben wir es uns zum Ziel gemacht dies zu vermeiden indem wir diesen wertvollen Rohstoff stattdessen upcyclen.

Unsere Produkte werden von einem kleinen frauengeführten Betrieb in Vietnam mit Liebe handgefertigt und anschließend CO2 neutral & plastikfrei nach Deutschland geschifft.

Name: Core Products Ltd
Description:
A family run business based in Perth, Scotland and formed in 1986. Over the past three decades we have established ourselves as one of the UK's leading suppliers of flat packed furniture, shelving and storage solutions and have been recognised with multiple industry awards, including Interiors Monthly best flat pack furniture supplier five years running (2019 to 2024). 

We provide an efficient and effective Direct Home Delivery (DHD) service and bulk pallet deliveries from our national distribution centre that is conveniently located at Glenrothes, Fife. With major route access to the UK road network for national distribution and only a short distance from Grangemouth port for international distribution. On average our warehouse houses upwards of 80,000 items of stock with a similar amount always under production or in transit from our production facilities around the World. We also offer container buying allowing us to cater for all our customers' needs.

As a forward thinking business, we have introduced many cutting edge technologies to better support our customers including 24 hour ordering, API and EDI technologies, managed PIM system, automated stock feeds and an abundance of product photography and lifestyles images, including 360° rotational images. 

Out Perth Head Office is where all out customer service is run from, with a longstanding, dedicated team read to assist with any query.

We are always looking to expand and refresh our catalogue of products, ensuring we stay at the forefront of trends and demands.

Name: Innovative Furniture Solutions
Description:
Who We Are
Innovative Furniture Solutions is dedicated to providing exceptional commercial furniture solutions tailored to your project's unique requirements. Our team of experienced project managers collaborates closely with you to ensure that all your furniture needs are met efficiently and effectively.

Our Services

Comprehensive Commercial Furniture Solutions
We specialize in a wide range of commercial furniture sectors, including:

Hospitals/Medical Facilities: Ergonomic and durable furniture designed for patient comfort and staff efficiency.
Hospitality: Stylish and functional furniture that enhances guest experiences.
Multi-Family Interior and Exterior: Versatile solutions for both indoor and outdoor living spaces.
Office Suites and Office Buildings: Modern and adaptable office furniture that promotes productivity.
Restaurant Furniture and Equipment: Durable and aesthetically pleasing options for dining establishments.
Outdoor Living: Quality furniture and shade options for outdoor spaces, ensuring comfort and style.
Custom Furniture Available
We do have the ability to customize certain furniture options too. Custom items must be purchased in bulk offerings, minimum purchase order required (50 units). There may be a cost to produce the model. Contact your project manager for more details.

Construction Division - Building Your Vision
In addition to our furniture offerings, we also have a specialized construction division ready to assist with both new builds and renovations for commercial and residential projects. Our construction specialists are here to ensure your vision comes to life seamlessly.

Consulting Relationships
At IFS, we understand that successful projects require not only innovative solutions but also the right expertise and guidance. That’s why we have partnered with industry leaders to enhance our consulting capabilities.

Name: Ahmed & Partners
Description:
Hello there! It's great to meet you, an experienced entrepreneur in the furniture industry. Over the past 25 years, I've been immersed in various roles within the industry, such as a retailer, wholesaler, importer, distributor, logistics director, sales director, and buyer. 

Throughout my career, I've been fortunate enough to establish and run several thriving businesses. My expertise primarily lies in being a seller, buyer, and logistics professional. However, since the pandemic began, I've been focused on setting up my latest venture, Ahmed and Partners Ltd.

I've always held a strong passion for the furniture industry, and my extensive experience has provided me with valuable insights and knowledge. I fully comprehend the complexities and challenges that come with this industry and have honed my skills in sales and procurement. Building strong relationships with suppliers and clients has always been a priority for me.

Despite the unprecedented challenges brought about by the pandemic, I've never been one to back down from adversity. That's exactly why I made the decision to start Ahmed and Partners Ltd. I firmly believe in adapting and evolving in the face of change, and this new venture perfectly embodies my entrepreneurial spirit.

Currently, we're in the process of establishing ourselves in Ireland with the assistance of our trusted partners. I envision Ahmed and Partners Ltd as a leading force in the furniture industry in Ireland, known for offering high-quality products and exceptional service.

I take immense pride in my track record of running successful businesses and inspiring others along the way. My unwavering commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction forms the cornerstone of Ahmed and Partners Ltd's growth. Through my entrepreneurial endeavors, I am determined to leave a lasting impact on the furniture industry.

Name: TopEShop Producent Mebli
Description:
Topeshop to producent mebli z własną produkcją i zapleczem magazynowym, działający w modelu B2B oraz sprzedaży wielokanałowej.
Projektujemy i produkujemy meble z myślą o skali, powtarzalności i długoterminowej współpracy. Obsługujemy partnerów biznesowych, dla których kluczowe są stabilność dostaw, przewidywalność procesów oraz możliwość planowania sprzedaży w oparciu o realną dostępność produktów.
Naszą przewagą jest pełna kontrola nad procesem od rozwoju produktu i przygotowania produkcji, przez wytwarzanie i planowanie, aż po magazynowanie, logistykę i obsługę posprzedażową. Dzięki temu możemy utrzymywać stałą jakość, terminowość oraz dostępność kluczowych kolekcji.
Współpracujemy z partnerami B2B, sieciami handlowymi, e-commerce oraz klientami, którzy oczekują nie tylko produktu, ale również uporządkowanych procesów i rzetelnej współpracy. Skala produkcji idzie u nas w parze z odpowiedzialnością operacyjną.
W Topeshop stawiamy na doświadczenie zespołów, dobrze zaprojektowane procesy oraz konsekwencję w działaniu. Wierzymy, że długoterminowe relacje biznesowe buduje się poprzez niezawodność, jakość i brak niespodzianek.
Na LinkedIn dzielimy się tym, jak wygląda codzienna praca firmy produkcyjnej od środka-procesami, decyzjami i wyzwaniami związanymi z produkcją i sprzedażą mebli.

Description:
The company was founded by two friends, designer Søren Essendrop, who holds a degree in Automotive Design, and product developer and entrepeneur Keld Jørgensen. Their idea for creating a chair that could be used in different ways arose during a conversation over a cup of coffee, where they discussed the challenges of sitting for extended periods during work and school, and the need to accommodate other ways of sitting and being together, without any restrictions on how to sit.

This led to the creation of the High Low chair. It was designed to be used by everyone, to sit however they wanted - high or low, alone or with others - hence the name "Rebel", a chair without rules. The company is dedicated to providing an innovative and unique chair that accommodates different seating positions and needs.

Name: Sonar's Experience Center
Description:
Over last few years Sonar’s has been the most awarded refurbished furniture organization in the industry!  
At Sonar’s Experience Center, we realized early on that most office furniture organization companies offer very similar products. We wanted to be different. So we analysed and improved every facet of our process from design to customer service. Today we are known in Navi Mumbai area for our professionalism, craftsmanship and service. The results show in our high satisfaction scores and in the quality of every system we make

We create stunning interiors for hotels, commercial properties, restaurants, & studio spaces, new start-up .We work fast, efficiently and treat small budgets with the same energy and enthusiasm as large scale projects.

At Sonars we believe in indulgence not only for our customers, but also for the planet. That is why we buy back your furniture so there is one less in a landfill.
Furniture waste disposal is highly problematic. Since furniture can’t easily be thrown out or recycled like other types of waste, it often gets dumped illegally and eight times out of ten simply ends up in a landfill. We strive to reduce our furniture waste by using the principles of circular economy, where we buy back your old furniture and give it a new lease of life.

Currently, we continue with our own designs, production and our own brands under the roof of Karad Group, with the excitement of the first day and the professionalism brought by years.

We are working tirelessly day and night to create a world brand from the lands of this great and beautiful country, without compromising our quality and prioritizing customer satisfaction in all these successful processes.

Because you deserve the best...

Các sản phẩm thiết bị tủ bếp, tủ áo thương hiệu Cariny đã được biết đến với chất lượng cao cấp đi kèm với giá thành cạnh tranh. Công ty là nhà phân phối chính thức nhiều sản phẩm thiết bị như bếp điện, bếp từ, lò nướng, lò vi sóng, chậu rửa, sen vòi... mang thương hiệu Việt Cariny và Haller. Mục đích của chúng tôi là nâng cao đời sống con người Việt bằng cách mang tới thị trường những sản phẩm cao cấp, mới lạ nhưng có giá cả phải chăng, dễ tiếp cận.
 
Ngoài ra, Cariny cũng là nhà phân phối chính thức của nhiều thương hiệu phụ kiện tủ bếp & tủ áo châu Âu khác như INOXA, Italiana Ferramenta, O.M.M, Lamello...
 
Công ty chúng tôi rất hân hạnh được phục vụ Quý khách và sẵn sàng hợp tác với mọi doanh nghiệp trên địa bàn cả nước để phát triển hệ thống phân phối & tiêu thụ sản phẩm. Xin chân thành cám ơn sự ủng hộ của Quý khách hàng đối với Công ty chúng tôi.

Wir denken ganzheitlich und individuell – dort, wo ein Produkt ins andere greift, wo aus einzelnen Lösungen ein harmonisches Gesamtkonzept entsteht und wo Funktionalität und Effizienz auf ein neues Level gehoben werden. 
Für uns sind Zubehör und Zusatzausstattungen keine Nebensache, sondern integrale Bestandteile, die den Unterschied machen.

Dank unserer jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung und dem Mut, über den Tellerrand hinauszublicken, schaffen wir Arbeitsumgebungen, die nicht nur funktional, sondern auch hochgradig organisiert und übersichtlich sind.

Name: Block&Gold Brands
Description:
Today's marketplace is flooded with inexpensive goods that can be obtained in an instant. What we found lacking were high quality artisan products that could be made at scale and still remain true to their origins. Items that maintain traditional craftsperson techniques and appeal to the design sensibility of today's savvy consumer.
 
Armed with years of experience in retail, interior design and manufacturing, we left the comfort of corporate America to start what is now BLOCK&GOLD BRANDS. Beginning with our namesake BLOCK&GOLD (a mashup of our last names) which focuses on a mix of modern and timeless home decor.

After some initial success we started exploring other avenues beyond home decor, specifically gourmet food. Thus, KITCH by BLOCK&GOLD was born. KITCH offers high-quality food that's easy to prepare and accessible yet beautiful and delicious. Regardless of comfort level, our mouthwatering shortcuts make it easy to prepare memorable meals with confidence.

As a service-based brand, we strive to be inclusive at every step. We are an LGBTQ+, AAPI, and BIPOC owned & operated organization. We humbly pledge our support to causes that raise the voices and provide opportunities to marginalized people and communities.

We are built on community and we're looking forward to you joining ours!

Name: Möbel Ferrari AG
Description:
Im Jahr 1963 gründete Josef Ferrari in Rapperswil SG, ein Möbelgeschäft aus dem später die Möbel Ferrari AG hervorging. Aus dem ursprünglichen Kleinbetrieb entwickelte es sich zum heutigen Betrieb mit 25 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter.

Im Jahr 2010 übergab Josef Ferrari das Unternehmen, an seinen Neffen René Ferrari. Damit bleibt die Firma, auch für die nächste Generation ein Familienunternehmen. Genauso wie es sich der Firmengründer, der keine eignen Kinder hat, wünschte. Möbel Ferrari hat sich in den letzten 50 Jahren, zu einem Kundenmagnet für „Günstige Möbel, zum Schlafen, Essen und Wohnen“ gemausert, und hat sich damit einen bedeutenden Namen geschaffen. Hinter dem Namen und dem Erfolg von Möbel Ferrari, stehen nicht nur die Geschäftsleitungsmitglieder, sondern auch all unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter.

Name: RALICA Furniture Houses PLC
Description:
"Мебелни къщи Ралица” АД е основана през 1994 година. Понастоящем компанията е в числото на най-значимите вносители и дистрибутори на мебели и обзавеждане у нас и един от най-големите доставчици по сделки за комплексно хотелско обзавеждане в България. 

Компания “Мебелни къщи Ралица” АД поддържа бизнес отношения с десетки водещи компании от над 15 държави в Европа, Америка и Азия, като подбира своите партньори по стриктни критерии и правила. Основен принцип в дейността на всички нива на нашия грижливо подбран и обучен персонал е предоставянето на качествени стоки и услуги и работа в интерес на клиентите и обществото.

ОТЛИЧИЯ
През 2003 година “Мебелни къщи Ралица” АД стана първата компания в своя бранш в България с присъдена сертификация по ISO 9001:2000 за въведената Система за управление на качеството.  В своята дейност, организация и управление компанията прилага устойчиви и ефективни правила и процедури, с които се гарантира постоянно високото качество на предлаганите услуги и управленски методи. Освен повод за гордост, тази сертификация за нас означава и едно постоянно предизвикателство и стремеж към непрестанно усъвършенстване във всички етапи на нашата работа.

Name: Skandi Denmark
Description:
Skandi er en international producent og importør af non-food volume varer såsom lightere, småelektronik samt LED lys og solcelle artikler under vores underbrand Cozzy Denmark. 
Vi har stor fokus på innovation og er konstant på udkig efter potentielle produkter til fordel for både kunder og forbrugere.
Som både producent og importør er vi i stand til at sikre høj kvalitet til den bedste pris. Skandi opererer i mere end 20 lande med hovedkontor i Danmark.

Brandet Cozzy Denmark er en del af virksomheden Skandi.

Skandi er en danskejet virksomhed som importerer et bredt udvalg af lightere, LED lys og solcelle artikler til B2B markedet .


Et moderne og trendsættende brand indenfor LED lys og Sollcelle artikler til hjemmet både inde og ude.

 

Cozzy stræber efter at være det fortrukne valg indenfor kategorien - LED lys, dekorationsbelysning og Solcelle artikler via kontinuerlig produktudvikling, gode priser, høj kvalitet og god service. Vi er løbende på "jagt" efter de produkter som netop repræsenterer tidens trends, både med fokus på funktionalitet, farver, miljøvenligt valg og pris. 

For Cozzy er det essentielt, at produkterne er flotte og inspirerende til enhver boligindretning både indendørs og udendørs, men funktionaliteten og kvaliteten skal også være i orden.

Kernen i Cozzy's produkter er evnen til at skabe den hyggelige atmosfære, som kendetegner lys og skabe stemning både indendørs

Much of our educational furniture is designed and manufactured in our purpose built factory in Whangarei, New Zealand, including desks, tables, teacher podiums, bookcases, whiteboard cabinets, storage units and much more. This allows us to offer our school furniture and equipment at some of the most competitive prices in the market and ensures that the items we supply to our customers are built to the highest standard and are delivered on time.

The beauty of manufacturing much of our educational furniture range in house is that it gives our customers the flexibility to order items such as tables, desks, bookcases and storage units in just about any height or size specifications they want. We are also very happy to discuss bespoke furniture requirements with our customers as the need arises. We are always working on designing, developing and sourcing new products to keep abreast of the current and future needs of education providers.

Name: Junk removal dubaii
Description:
Junk removal is the process of disposing of unwanted items such as old furniture, home appliances, and other clutter. Many people find that over time, they accumulate more and more items that they no longer need or want. This can lead to a cluttered living or working space, which can cause stress and even impact one's mental health.

Living or working in a cluttered space can make it difficult to focus, and it can also be overwhelming to try to sort through everything and figure out what to keep and what to get rid of. In addition, having a lot of junk lying around can make it difficult to move around and can create safety hazards. For these reasons, many people choose to hire a junk removal service to take care of the problem for them.

Junk removal services are an easy and stress-free way to get rid of unwanted items. The process is simple: you just contact the service and schedule a pickup time. They will come to your home or office, load up all the items you want to get rid of, and take them away for you. This frees up space and can give you a sense of relief and accomplishment.
At Home Junk Removal Dubai, we understand that getting rid of unwanted items can be a hassle. That's why we're dedicated to providing a stress-free experience for our customers. Name: GJ Styles
Description:
GJ Styles was founded by Glyn and Jill Styles in 1985 in Leominster, a small town in Herefordshire, England. In 1997, recognizing a demand for antique reproductions in the United States, the business was moved to High Point, NC.

In 2008, after several years of success, GJ Styles entered a joint venture partnership with Halo Asia, creating Halo Styles. As recognition of the brand grew, so did the range of product offerings, and Halo Styles ultimately became the “place to go” for new and exciting pieces.

In 2014, after six years of partnership, Glyn Styles led a buyout of the company from its Halo partners. The company, now known as GJ Styles, continued to distribute Halo’s products, including brands like Timothy Oulton and Halo, in addition to other popular collections.

In 2024, the business was purchased by industry veteran Doug Diemoz, who has held senior leadership roles with Williams-Sonoma (Pottery Barn), Restoration Hardware, and as CEO of Crate & Barrel. He also co-founded and led an upholstery manufacturing operation in Northern California.
GJ Styles exhibits collections at their trade-only showroom located in High Point, NC, which is open year-round and welcomes retailers and designers alike.

Believing that no order is too big or small, GJ Styles does not have any minimum purchase requirements. All orders ship FOB from the GJ Styles distribution center located in High Point, NC.

I nostri interlocutori ideali
La nostra offerta è rivolta principalmente ad architetti e interior designer, con i quali collaboriamo per realizzare spazi di lavoro che rispondano alle più alte esigenze estetiche e funzionali. Siamo un partner affidabile per la fornitura di ambienti contract, uffici aziendali, spazi pubblici e privati, offrendo consulenza e soluzioni su misura.

Il nostro approccio
Office & Design si distingue per un approccio consulenziale, che parte sempre dall’ascolto delle esigenze del cliente e dall’architetto. Grazie alla nostra esperienza e al nostro network di brand di alta qualità, offriamo soluzioni personalizzate che uniscono design, ergonomia e sostenibilità. La nostra missione è rendere ogni spazio un ambiente stimolante, produttivo e confortevole.

Name: FurnExim Furniture Export
Description:
With unparalalled access to reliable manufacturers and high-quality furniture, export-ready infrastructure, strong value chain from manufacturing to logistics to distribution; FurnExim shares its compelling unfair competitive advantage with it's manufacturers and clients.

Product Sourcing
We work with suppliers to source high-quality furniture and outdoor products that meet our clients' needs. Our team conducts regular quality checks to ensure products meet our standards and exceed our cliens' expectations.

Export Process Optimization

The export process for furniture and outdoor garden furniture can be complex and time-consuming. By automating and streamlining the process, we can improve efficiency and reduce costs.

Efficient Export Process Managment
Our end-to-end management system ensures that every aspect of the export process for furniture and outdoor products is handled efficiently and effectively. From sourcing the best raw materials to manufacturing, quality control, packaging, and shipping, we take care of it all.


Automation
Automation can be used to streamline the export process by automating tasks such as document creation, labeling, and shipping. This can reduce errors and save time.

Streamlining
Streamlining the export process can be achieved by simplifying the documentation and labeling requirements, reducing the number of steps in the process, and improving communication between stakeholders.

OUR SERVICES:
Furniture: manufacturing furniture from all kinds of materials, subcontracting, assembly.

Description:

Enouvation changed that equation by rethinking power entirely. Instead of forcing furniture to adapt to electricity, Enouvation made electricity adapt to furniture.

Name: MODIY
Description:
Welkom bij MODIY – jouw online meubelstudio. Jij ontwerpt en wij maken. Via onze gebruiksvriendelijke configurator stel je zelf een uniek meubelstuk samen dat precies past bij jouw ruimte en stijl. Geen standaardoplossingen, maar je kunt zelf slim gaan ontwerpen. Meubels echt op maat, met oog voor kwaliteit, detail én budget. MODIY geeft DIY een nieuwe dimensie en jouw interieur maakbaar, persoonlijk, passend en betaalbaar.

Bij MODIY combineren we online ontwerpen met de kwaliteit van een echte meubelmaker. Uitgekiende vormen gemaakt van de beste materialen voor een mooi ogend, sterk en duurzaam meubel. Kleuren vormen en structuren die aansluiten bij jouw oog voor esthetiek en kwaliteit. Alles wordt geproduceerd in Nederland en België, met moderne CNC-machines en oog voor detail. Zo garanderen we korte levertijden, hoge afwerkingskwaliteit en een duurzaam productieproces.

MODIY is ontstaan vanuit Zagenzagen.nl, een platform dat sinds 2018 de wereld van op maat zagen en frezen heeft veranderd. Achter MODIY staan softwareontwikkelaar Mark Smits en ontwerper Robin van der Werff, die eerder al het volledige maakproces voor professionals automatiseerde. Nu zetten ze hun kennis en netwerk in voor jou: met kwaliteitsmateriaal, vakwerk en CNC-productie in Nederland en België. Dat betekent: korte lijnen, hoge precisie en een meubel waar je jarenlang van geniet.

Name: SitOnThatThang
Description:
SitOnThatThang LLC is a young, fast-growing furniture restoration and junk removal company built by students and recent college grads with the drive to scale something real. We restore used couches and home furnishings, bring them back to life, and sell them at a fraction of retail prices — always with delivery and in-home setup included. Our goal is to make quality furniture affordable and accessible for anyone furnishing a new space.

Alongside furniture restoration, we also operate a sustainable junk removal service. Unlike traditional haulers, we donate, repurpose, recycle, and resell items whenever possible. This reduces waste, cuts down dump fees, and helps us offer pricing that’s consistently much cheaper than every major junk removal competitor. Our model keeps good furniture out of landfills and in circulation.

As a young company, we’re building a team of motivated people who want to learn, create, and grow with us. We’re expanding our social media presence, improving our digital footprint, and building systems as we scale. Whether you’re interested in marketing, social media, operations, logistics, content creation, or hands-on service work, SitOnThatThang offers real experience and a chance to contribute to a brand on the rise.

What We Do

Restore & resell high-quality used couches and furniture

Provide low-cost, donation-first junk removal

Deliver and install furniture directly into homes

Repurpose and recycle items to reduce landfill waste

Run a lean, modern business model built for rapid growth

Who We’re Looking For

Driven students, creatives, and recent grads who want real-world experience in a growing business — especially in marketing, content creation, social media, and operations.

Our Mission

To make furniture affordable, junk removal sustainable, and work meaningful for young people ready to build something.

Name: Bacarri

We specialize in creating beautiful and durable outdoor spaces for hotels, resorts, restaurants, cafes, and bars. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to innovation. We are constantly researching new trends in the hospitality industry and incorporating them into our designs to make sure our products are always cutting-edge.

The goal of our company is to assist commercial interior designers, hotels and commercial properties in creating functional and beautiful outdoor spaces that will attract and retain visitors. Our company understands the importance of sustainability, so we work hard to offer the best products that can withstand even the most extreme outdoor environments.

Thank you for considering Bacarri for your commercial outdoor furniture needs. We look forward to working with you on creating the perfect outdoor space for your property.

Description:
Wir haben eine innovative Lösung zur Aufbewahrung in Garagen entwickelt und patentiert. 

Diese Idee kann Garagenherstellern helfen, für ihre Garagen einen deutlichen Mehrwert zu schaffen. Somit wird es leichter, sich von Mitbewerbern positiv abzuheben. Das hilft sowohl beim Absatz, als auch bei den Margen.

Name: drin & draussen
Description:
drin & draussen ist ein Unternehmen, das sich auf den Verkauf von Möbeln im Skandi-Stil, Landhausmöbeln und Designermöbeln spezialisiert hat. Stilvolle skandinavische Möbel und Wohnaccessoires wie etwa der Marke Hübsch Interior zählen ebenso zur weiten Bandbreite des Sortiments von drin & draussen wie die edlen Landhausmöbel der Marke Eichholtz - inspiriert vom Süden Frankreichs und der italienischen Riviera. Elegante Designermöbel von Boca do Lobo runden das Angebot ab und bieten eine einzigartige Kombination aus traditioneller Handwerkskunst und zeitgenössischem Design. 

Darüber hinaus hat drin & draussen eine eigene Möbelmarke namens drin & draussen-Interior. Besonderes Augenmerk dieser Marke liegt darauf, dass die Möbel aus Holz produziert werden, das aus nachhaltiger Waldbewirtschaftung stammt. Die Möbel werden experimentell und in Einzelfertigung hergestellt und es werden auch Recyclingmöbel angeboten. Zudem legt drin & draussen-Interior großen Wert darauf, dass faire Löhne an die Handwerkerinnen und Handwerker in den europäischen Möbelwerkstätten gezahlt werden. Soweit möglich werden außerdem CO2-Kompensationen für den Transport der Möbel durchgeführt.

Das Sortiment von drin & draussen bietet somit eine große Auswahl an hochwertigen Möbeln für Kundinnen und Kunden, die Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit und Design legen. Mit einem breiten Angebot an skandinavischen, Landhaus- und Designermöbeln verschiedener renommierter Marken sowie eigenen Kreationen aus nachhaltigen Materialien bietet drin & draussen seinen Kunden eine Vielfalt an Einrichtungsmöglichkeiten - für drinnen und draußen.

Name: CURIO
Description:
“A house warmed with antiquities,
Is a home graced by tenderness”

I am coming from a small but unique town that happens to be a cradle of world’s brass craftsmanship. As my father before me, I am paying tribute to my people‘s legacy and I want their talent to be celebrated all over India and beyond . 

I am a filmmaker, a visual artist, a story-teller and I have always had a passion for a rich frame filled with exquisite objects. This passion has pushed me into designing and producing such articles, sturdy and elegant at once, that would upgrade your frame, your space , your home and your soul to another level of the sublime. 

If you are fascinated with original modern, ethnic and fusion brass artifacts, then you are at the right spot. This is our acquisition of antique collectables and decor pieces, designed by curiosity of a creative mind and produced with devotion to this ancient  intricate art. Each item carries a story within and days and hours of dedicated work inspired by tradition and legacy. 

Explore the world of Indian antiques craftsmanship, take a look at the distinctive designs and period relics, and use CURIO as the way of going back in time and satisfying your inner longing for the olden days. 

Your curiosity will be rewarded here, with us.

Name: Granpiel
Description:
Granpiel Sofás S.L.U. es una empresa de fabricación de sofás ubicada en Yecla (Murcia), perteneciente al Grupo Mydel.

Granpiel se fundó en 2018 con el objetivo de fabricar sofás de alta gama. Desde los inicios se han creado modelos con un diseño pensado para la comodidad y la elegancia.

En Granpiel se utilizan materiales de primera calidad. Pieles del mejor vacuno y telas actuales con los mejores tratamientos; Innovamos con las estructuras de los sofás utilizando el metal como elemento identificativo; Mecanismos eléctricos más vanguardistas pensados para la comodidad y la resistencia; Gomas de alta densidad de hasta 42 kg y viscoelástica de hasta 70 kg; Utilizamos para nuestros rellenos fibra hueca siliconada de primera calidad, microfibra de poliéster y pluma de oca natural.

En Granpiel se fabrican los sofás utilizando las últimas tecnologías conjuntamente con los trabajos artesanales, para conseguir unos acabados minuciosos, con el objetivo de fabricar los sofás con una excelente relación calidad-precio.

Name: GalleriaYou
Description:
The Jewelry Closet by GalleriaYou is a patent-pending, space-saving, vertical  jewelry organizer that combines thoughtfully designed components into an endlessly customizable jewelry solution. 

It’s the *only* modular jewelry storage system of its kind, meticulously engineered to give every piece a practical and protective place. 

It’s patent-pending design is customizable, compact, and positioned to completely disrupt the $27.50 billion global jewelry organizer market—and the closet accessory and home safe industries that attempt to organize and support it.

Here’s why:
 Jewelry-wearers in North America spend $65 billion on new accessories every year. As their collections grow, they need an accessible place for every new piece. 
 The global jewelry organizer industry is worth $27.5 billion—and is full of outdated, poor-quality, and impractical products that frustrate consumers. Closet accessory, home safe, and home organizer companies have a significant opportunity to meet this market at its gap. 

 90% of all purchasing decisions are now made or informed by women—most of whom claim the bulk of the closet space. They’re actively looking for their go-to organization brands to offer customizable, compact, and sophisticated solutions. 

The Jewelry Closet meets the growing need for a complete (and chic!) custom closet, home safe, and jewelry storage solution. The Jewelry Closet's novel smart design also has multiple possible applications for organizing and housing other types of collections.

And it’s now available for licensing with select custom closet accessory, home safe, and home organizer product manufacturers and suppliers. 

Visit thejewelerycloset.co to learn more about The Jewelry Closet’s conscientious approach to visible, functional jewelry storage and display.

Name: Teak New
Description:
TEAK NEW is a manufacturer and exporter of outdoor teak furniture managed by PT Indonesia Indah Cemerlang, based in Jepara, Indonesia—a city internationally recognized as a center for high-quality wood carving and furniture. We have been in the industry for over 10 years, delivering superior products handcrafted by the skilled hands of local craftsmen.

We focus on manufacturing outdoor furniture from premium solid teak, the preferred choice for beauty and durability in all weather conditions. Each TEAK NEW product is designed to provide comfort, durability, and a natural aesthetic that blends seamlessly with outdoor spaces such as gardens, terraces, balconies, and resorts and villas.

With a commitment to quality and precision, we only use SVLK-certified teak, ensuring sustainability and environmental responsibility. Our production process combines traditional Jepara techniques with modern export standards—making each piece of furniture a functional and durable work of art.

Backed by experience exporting to numerous countries, TEAK NEW is ready to be your trusted partner in providing high-value, authentic outdoor furniture ready to compete in the global.

Imagine:

Warmth and texture with a handwoven jute rug made from natural fibers.
Rustic charm with a reclaimed wood frame showcasing artwork.
Conversation-starting pieces like intricately carved coconut shell sculptures.
Experience the Alamdar difference:

Sustainable materials: We source all our materials responsibly, ensuring minimal environmental impact.

Name: Ministry of Happy Walls
Description:
Op maat gemaakt behang met eigen inbreng

 Behang op maat maken is mijn specialiteit. Ik maak het niet alleen tot op de centimeter passend, maar zorg er ook voor dat het ontwerp helemaal naar je zin is.  Daarbij verschuif ik de bloemen, dieren en planten in het design zodat de afbeelding mooi blijft en kloppend is. Heb je een muur die niet standaard is? Rare hoekjes? Geen probleem. 
 Ik denk met je mee
 Wanneer je een preview aanvraagt, heb je die binnen twee werkdagen in huis. Als de preview naar je zin is, krijg je een beveiligde betaallink. En dan heb je je behang binnen een week in huis. Voorbeelden van previews zijn op de site te zien. 
 Op maat maken is gratis, je betaalt alleen het aantal m2 behang. Ik heb vinyl behang, vliesbehang met matte coating en Ecotex. De laatste twee zijn 100% recyclebaar. Voor vochtige ruimtes en keukens is er Airtex.

 Over mij:
Ministry of Happy Walls is mijn geesteskindje. Het idee ontstond toen ik zelf op zoek ging naar mooi behang voor mijn huiskamer. En niet kon slagen. De kleur of de ontwerpen waren het net niet. Leveranciers van op maat gemaakt behang waren te prijzig. En ik wilde gewoon iets aan de muur wat niet iedereen had. Dus ontwierp ik mijn eigen behang.
En tot mijn blijdschap bleek er behoefte te zijn aan deze service.  Zo is Ministry of Happy Walls gestart.
 Mooie, originele ontwerpen gedrukt op topkwaliteit materialen voor een redelijke prijs, dat is het idee. 
Benieuwd naar previews? Kijk eens bij `Uitgelicht'. Daar staan een aantal links. 

contact@ministryofhappywalls.com. 
 www.ministryofhappywalls.com

Name: The Tuff Bunch
Description:
Remember the carefree days of childhood, where discoveries were in abundance and the sun seemed to shine at its brightest? 

Well from this nostalgic place in our hearts an idea was sparked, and a company was formed.“The Tuff Bunch” crew is a family run business founded by Allen Garb and his daughter Matti (the new mama bear) who are both passionate about the developmental and functional needs of our youngest members, Jesse & Milli, but more importantly about creating memories that last a lifetime.  

Understanding the importance of children’s formative years, the colourful and safe products at “Tuff” help promote an environment where children can be at their creative best. From this notion the “Tuff Play” range was born -  a vibrant collection of multi coloured furniture & toys, designed to enhance your kiddies creative mind through the power of play!

Tuff Play's Furniture encourages table-top play-time activities and hands-on creative learning. Only fun mess is welcomed on these stackable and easy to clean surfaces with no assembly required. With an exciting choice of ride-ons, sand pits, slides and more. You can be sure to find that special toy that fosters an engaging, fun and educational environment for all enthusiastic tots.

Our products are fully recyclable and produced conscientiously. Our manufacturer (over 30 years in business) has designed a system within the production flow to recycle all waste and convert into recycled eco-friendly products for entry level markets, assisting nature and protecting the environment as we go. 

Our products are made to last, and we have first hand proof of its longevity as Jesse and Milli are currently making use of their mama’s first ever table and chair set – 27 years on -  and it’s still as colourful and practical as the first day she got it.

Our core strategy has always revolved around providing affordable yet top-quality furniture, mattresses, and accessories, all while delivering exceptional customer service. This commitment has been at the heart of our success, and we continue to prioritize it to best meet the needs of our valued customers in India, specifically in Bhavnagar, Surat, and Vadodara.

Our corporate office and Distribution Center are poised to ensure efficient operations and timely deliveries, making your furniture shopping experience with Bosk Furniture in Bhavnagar, Surat, and Vadodara a seamless one.

At Bosk Furniture, our vision knows no boundaries. We are committed to delivering exceptional value and quality to our customers in India, mirroring our legacy in the india.

Description:
At Lion Kitchen Remodel - lionkitchenremodel.com, we specialize in transforming outdated or dysfunctional kitchens and bathrooms into stunning and functional spaces that will enhance your daily routine and increase the value of your home. 

Our team provides expert kitchen remodeling and bathroom remodeling services throughout the West Coast of Florida, including Sarasota, North Port, Venice, and surrounding areas. 

Our Services:

Kitchen Remodeling

A modern and well-designed kitchen is both beautiful and practical, making it one of the most important rooms in any home. Some of our popular kitchen remodeling services include:

• Cabinet Installation: We offer a wide range of cabinet styles, finishes, and configurations to suit all tastes and budgets. From classic wood panels to sleek glass doors, our cabinets come in various sizes and layout options to maximize storage capacity and minimize clutter.

• Countertop Replacement: Available in materials ranging from natural stone to engineered quartz, our countertops add style, durability, and functionality to any kitchen. 

• Flooring Options: To complete your dream kitchen, we offer versatile flooring solutions in ceramic tiles, vinyl planks, hardwood, and luxury vinyl tile (LVT).

Bathroom Renovation

The bathroom is another essential space in your home that requires careful planning and execution. 

At Lion Kitchen Remodel, we strive to deliver luxurious and serene bath experiences tailored to your specific preferences and lifestyle demands. Our bathroom renovation services cover everything from basic fixtures replacement to major structural changes, such as adding extra showers or bathtubs, moving walls or windows, or creating separate powder rooms.

Contact Us Today!

Whether you live in Sarasota, North Port, Venice, or any nearby city along the West Coast of Florida, our professionals are ready to assist you with your upcoming kitchen remodeling or bathroom remodeling project.

DongaHome.vn đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu khắt khe nhất của bạn. Mọi sản phẩm, dịch vụ của chúng tôi đều hướng tới sự hài lòng của bạn với giá cả tốt nhất tại Việt Nam.

Đặc biệt, Đông Á – DongaHome.vn có những loại đệm, chăn ga gối còn có tác dụng điều hòa nhiệt độ. Chúng biết tự điều chỉnh phù hợp với nhiệt độ cơ thể của bạn. Đây là giải pháp trị liệu, giảm căng thẳng, mệt mỏi bạn sau mỗi ngày dài làm việc.

Thành tựu đạt được của chăn ga gối đệm, nội thất Đông Á – DongaHome.vn
Sau 12 năm (từ năm 2006 đến 2018), Đông Á – DongaHome.vn tham gia thị trường bán buôn và bán lẻ chăn ga gối đệm. Chúng tôi đã lỗ lực phát triển không ngừng nghỉ. Đến nay, Đông Á – DongaHome.vn tự hào là nhà phân phối chăn ga gối đệm có sự tăng trưởng doanh số đều và bền vững. Chúng tôi đã dành được trọn niềm tin của các nhà sản xuất hàng đầu Việt Nam. Bên cạnh đó, Đông Á cũng nhận được sự ủng hộ vô cùng lớn lao của hệ thống 116 đại lý trên toàn hệ thống và hơn 2.500 khách hàng thân thiết.

Why Blabea?

Craftsmanship: Every piece is meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans, ensuring precision and artistry in every detail.
Durability: We use premium materials and proven methods to create furniture that stands the test of time, blending resilience with elegance.
Customization: Your vision drives our process—tailor everything from materials and finishes to dimensions for a truly personalized result.
Customer Satisfaction: We prioritize your experience, from initial consultation to final installation, fostering lasting relationships built on trust and delight.

Name: Galter Meble
Description:
Jej założycielem jest Michał Cinkowski - pasjonat motoryzacji i pielęgnacji ogrodu (zwłaszcza swojego ;).

Drugą osobą, która dołożyła swoją cegiełkę do powstania firmy jest Robert Mazur - pasjonat sportu, w szczególności piłki nożnej i skoków narciarskich ;).

Oboje dążymy i pragniemy aby obsługa zamówień i naszych Klientów była na jak najwyższym poziomie. Dzięki bogatej ofercie z najlepszych fabryk w Polsce jesteśmy w stanie sprostać każdemu projektowi. Na naszej ekspozycji można zobaczyć i przetestować: fotele biurowe, krzesła konferencyjne, meble biurowe i gabinetowe, lady recepcyjne oraz szafy metalowe aktowe, socjalne, sejfy i szafy atestowane - ZAPRASZAMY K. Cedry 6 Lok LU9, 91-129 Łódź

Galter Meble Biurowe i Metalowe to firma zajmująca się szeroko pojętą sprzedażą mebli biurowych oraz metalowych. Działamy na rynku już od wielu lat i zdobyliśmy duże doświadczenie w branży meblarskiej. Nasze produkty wyróżnia wysoka jakość wykonania, estetyka i trwałość, co czyni je wyjątkowo atrakcyjnymi dla naszych klientów.

W Galter Meble zawsze stawiamy na profesjonalizm, co pozwala nam na zapewnienie najwyższej jakości obsługi klienta. Nasza firma składa się z zespołu wysokiej klasy specjalistów, którzy są w stanie sprostać każdemu wyzwaniu. Współpracujemy jedynie z renomowanymi producentami mebli, co daje nam pewność, że oferujemy naszym klientom produkty najlepszej jakości.

Nasza stabilna pozycja na rynku jest efektem wieloletniej pracy i ciągłego rozwoju. Cieszymy się uznaniem wśród klientów i współpracowników, którzy doceniają nasze wysokiej klasy produkty i profesjonalną obsługę. Nasze meble metalowe są idealnym rozwiązaniem dla osób poszukujących eleganckich i trwałych mebli, które będą służyć przez wiele lat.

W Galter Meble zawsze stawiamy na indywidualne podejście do klienta, co pozwala nam na spełnienie nawet najbardziej wymagających oczekiwań. Nasza oferta obejmuje meble metalowe do biura, sklepu, magazynu, a także do domu i ogrodu.

Name: Essential Home Group International
Description:
Our original company: Furnline Furniture Factory Company Ltd., was founded during July, 2013.
in the town of Liangjing near Huizhou City in eastern Guangdong Province.   This location was
selected as a town offering high quality of life well removed from the crowded urban centers.
In order to best serve our customer's international needs, we collaborate with furniture
designers from the United State, China and Vietnam.   These designer assist our customers
with a wide range of product categories including both casegoods and upholstery.
Furnline's primary business has been making specialized casegoods for use in both residential
and commercial settings.   These specialized pieces include bathroom vanity cabinets and
decorative wooden range hoods for kitchens.   In addition to specialized products, we also
manufacture a standard range of furniture pieces including, home ofﬁce, occasional, dining and
accents items.
Due to continued growth our our business and as a reaction to new global economic realities,
we opened a new factory in Vietnam during March of 2019.   This completely new facility located
in Ben Cat, Binh Duong Province has more than more than 400,000 square feet (35,000 sq.   m)
of production facilities, ofﬁces and warehouses.
The newly constructed complex utilizes innovations in production and ﬁnishing line technology.
These lines, plus of state-of-the-art CNC machinery will allow our new factory (Essential Home
Furniture) to produce nearly four times as many pieces annually and our location in Lianging.
At this time, Essential Home's new location employs nearly ﬁve hundred line technicians, ofﬁce
staff and managers.   The goal is to increase employment to nearly one thousand people who
will create and ship one hundred containers of furniture each month.
We invite you to visit either, or both locations so we may explore ways Furnline & Essential
Home may assist your business growth.
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, BINH DUONG

Name: Bamboopanelen.nl
Description:
Bamboepanelen.nl – Duurzame Luxe aan de Wand

Bij Bamboepanelen.nl combineren we elegantie, klasse en duurzaamheid in één uniek product: hoogwaardige bamboe wandpanelen. Onze panelen brengen een tijdloze, luxueuze uitstraling in iedere ruimte en transformeren wanden in stijlvolle eyecatchers.

Onze collectie biedt een breed scala aan designs: van natuursteen- en marmerlook, tot leer-, linnen- en houtstructuren, en zelfs metalen afwerkingen. Of het nu gaat om een woonkamer, slaapkamer, keuken, badkamer, toilet of kantoor — onze wandpanelen zijn overal toepasbaar en passen bij iedere stijl en inrichting.

Waarom bamboe?
Bamboe is een van de meest duurzame materialen ter wereld. Onze panelen zijn 100% vochtbestendig, schimmelwerend, onderhoudsvriendelijk en milieuvriendelijk geproduceerd. Ze zijn stabiel, sterk en behouden hun schoonheid jarenlang, waardoor ze een verstandige én stijlvolle investering zijn. Bovendien zijn ze brandvertragend (B1-gecertificeerd) en vrij van schadelijke stoffen, waardoor ze geschikt zijn voor zowel particuliere als zakelijke toepassingen.

Innovatieve montage
Onze panelen zijn eenvoudig te monteren, zonder acclimatie of ventilatie, en verkrijgbaar in diktes van 5 mm en 8 mm. Dankzij naadloze veer-en-groef systemen, kitverbindingen of profielen met optionele LED-verlichting creëer je een strakke, naadloze wand die luxe en functionaliteit combineert. Voor hoeken en ronde wanden kunnen de panelen flexibel worden gevormd met verhitting, waardoor volledig maatwerk mogelijk is.

Bij Bamboepanelen.nl geloven we dat luxe én duurzaamheid hand in hand gaan. Onze wandpanelen bieden tijdloze schoonheid, tactiele elegantie en een gevoel van exclusiviteit, terwijl ze tegelijkertijd praktisch en milieuvriendelijk zijn.

Benieuwd hoe bamboe jouw interieur kan transformeren?
Neem contact met ons op via ons formulier en ons team adviseert je persoonlijk over de perfecte oplossing voor jouw project.

Uluslararası toptan alıcıların Türk toptancı tedarikçileri ve sadece yerli ürünleri bulmasına yardımcı olmak üzere kurulmuş bir oluşum olan Turkish Office Furniture; ofis mobilyası ithal eden dünyanın dört bir yanındaki ithalatçıların birinci sınıf kaynak arayışına yerli ürünlerle çözüm sunmaktadır.

Kaliteli malzeme tercihleri, yılların deneyimi ve usta ellerin dokunuşuyla Türkiye’de üretilen mobilyalar uzun yıllardır dünya pazarında büyük ilgi ve talep görmektedir. Türkiye, dünyanın çeşitli ülkeleriyle ticaret yapma konusundaki bu potansiyeliyle her geçen gün ihracat oranını da yükseltmektedir. Türk üreticilerin ihracat faaliyetlerini genişletmek ve büyütmek, potansiyeline uygun bir pazar yaratmak ve yerli üreticilere tek bir kanaldan ulaşımı kolaylaştırmak amacıyla yola çıkan Turkish Office Furniture, ofis mobilyası sektöründe uluslararası toptan satışa öncülük ederek istikrarlı bir şekilde büyümeyi hedeflemektedir. Turkish Office olarak yerli mobilya işletmelerinin dünya çapında ağ oluşturmasına, uluslararası ticari ilişkiler kurmasına, ürünlerini tanıtmasına ve iş fırsatları yaratmasına olanak sunmanın gururunu yaşamaktayız.

Turkish Office çatısı altında 382 farklı kategoride; çalışma ve ofis masaları, ofis takımları, toplantı masası ve sandalyeleri, çalışma alanları ürünleri, karşılama bankoları ve makam masaları gibi çeşitli ofis ve büro mobilyalarının satışına aracılık etmekteyiz. Her geçen gün bu kategorilerde mobilyalar üreten yerli girişimcilerimiz bünyemize katılmaya devam ederek ihracat faaliyetlerine yeni bir boyut kazandırmaktadır.

Name: Möbel Lippold MC GmbH
Description:
Barocke Eleganz, globale Handwerkskunst - mit einem Erbe mit Charakter.


MACE HERITAGE ist eine Premiummarke, die von der Möbel Lippold MC GmbH entwickelt wurde, einem familiengeführten Möbelunternehmen mit Sitz in Deutschland  und starken Wurzeln im internationalen Holzhandwerk und Design. Inspiriert von der zeitlosen Schönheit des Barocks, des Rokokos, des Louis XVI. und des Empire-Stils haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, Möbel zu kreieren, die den historischen Charme in die moderne Inneneinrichtung bringen .


Obwohl unser Unternehmen seinen Sitz in Deutschland hat, sind unsere Produktionspartner international ansässig  - sorgfältig ausgewählt aufgrund ihrer Meisterschaft in der handwerklichen Herstellung von Möbeln, Schnitzereien und raffinierten Verarbeitungen. Unsere Stücke sind nicht „Made in Germany“, aber sie entsprechen den hohen Standards und der Ästhetik, die europäische Möbel auszeichnen.


Von einem kleinen Projekt aus Leidenschaft hat sich MACE HERITAGE zu einer anerkannten Marke entwickelt, die zwei exklusive Kollektionen anbietet:


 Individual Collection - Vollständig anpassbare Barockmöbel, die auf Bestellung gefertigt werden: Wählen Sie Ihre Holzoberfläche, den Stoff, die Farbe, die Größe und sogar die Ornamente. Perfekt für Kunden, die Einzigartigkeit und künstlerischen Wert suchen.

 Studio Collection - Kuratierte, sofort lieferbare Stücke für alle, die Wert auf schnelle Lieferung und zeitloses Design zu einem erschwinglichen Preis legen.


Jedes Stück von MACE HERITAGE spiegelt eine tiefe Wertschätzung für Details, Geschichte und Individualität wider . Ob es sich um einen vergoldeten Thronsessel, einen geschnitzten Konsolentisch oder ein modernes Stück mit klassischer Seele handelt - wir glauben, dass Möbel sprechen sollten.

Heute sind wir stolz darauf, Kunden in ganz Europa, dem Nahen Osten und darüber hinaus zu bedienen - von Luxuswohnungen und Boutique-Hotels bis hin zu Privathäusern und Ausstellungsräumen.

Name: Dauphine Mirror Co.
Description:
On a trip to Indonesia, Attorney & Importer Joseph McKearn stumbled upon an English designer, Christopher Guy Harrison, that was producing hand carved mirror frames, furniture & accessories. They formed an unofficial partnership and Joseph McKearn and his sons Scott & Todd quickly established Dauphine Mirror Co. as one of the leading high end mirror wholesalers in the world. Selling to a "who's who" of the high end home furnishings world. To the top mail order catalogs and retailers and providing over a million dollars worth of product to the Bellagio hotel, all in the first two year in business. 

As an Attorney, McKearn understood that there needed to be a long term contract and McKearn and Harrison repeatedly met around the world to come to an agreement. After several years of McKearn coming back empty handed, it became clear that Harrison had no intentions of honoring their agreement and that as soon as the multi-million dollar factory was paid for by the McKearn's, that he was going to cut them out and go direct. Sadly this is what happened to the McKearn's and all of the other distributors around the world. The McKearn's focused on growing their lighting business and other home furnishings ventures.

Hyper local, we make everything in our studio by hand, and work with other U.S. based companies to source our materials, delivering a limited-run of unique goods. In a fast-paced and disposable world, we’ve returned to a more methodical, and yes, slower, production process in order to deliver items that we hope will earn a permanent place in your home. 

With a background in decorative painting and surface finishing through our sister company, Seirup Design Studio, we’ve collaborated with some of the world’s leading interior designers for the past 20 years. Seirup Design was founded in order to bring our original designs to the public. Our showroom, serving the Greater Topsail Beach community, is designed to feel like home: clean, calm, and uncluttered, with soft lighting and a warm, laid-back atmosphere. We carry top-tier brands like Tempur-Pedic, Sealy, Serta, and Simmons Beautyrest, plus premium pillows, adjustable bases, protectors, and frames — all handpicked, personally tested, and backed by expert guidance. And, depending on the type of furniture you’re selling, you’ll want to use different words to describe it. For example, if you’re selling a couch, you might want to describe it as comfortable, stylish, and spacious.

Description:
Casa Atlântica es un baño helado en el océano en verano y un paseo por el bosque en otoño. Es tradición, emoción y respeto por el medio ambiente; es sostenibilidad, artesanía y diseño.

Desde 2014 trabajamos para poner en valor oficios que poco a poco se van perdiendo: nuestros objetos nacen en aldeas de Galicia y Portugal de las manos de artesanos que, con materiales como la cerámica, el mimbre o la madera, dan vida a nuestros diseños del mejor modo que se nos ocurre: sin prisas.

Casa Atlântica son pequeñas colecciones de productos singulares e imperfectos en los que queda patente la huella de los artesanos que los han creado. Objetos que cuentan pequeñas historias que remiten al presente a la vez que inmortalizan el pasado. 

Nuestra filosofía se basa en ofrecer productos contemporáneos al tiempo que fomentamos la artesanía local, dando también prioridad a la producción en el rural a través de pequeños talleres familiares ubicados en pequeñas aldeas y pueblos de Galicia y Portugal.

Name: QLdecor
Description:
[ENGLISH BELOW]

PL:

Jako jedyni w Polsce dystrybuujemy laminowane, metalizowane płyty meblowe z naturalnego drewna, zamiast tych nietrwałych z recyklingu, oraz unikalne okucia meblowe i uchwyty. 

Co nas wyróżnia? Te 3 rzeczy:
• jakość bez kompromisów – żadnych tanich płyt wiórowych czy kiepskich okuć z cynku. Tylko najlepsze materiały home decor, które przetrwają próbę czasu.
• spersonalizowany design, który zapiera dech – nasze materiały to nie tylko funkcjonalność, to esencja stylu i luksusu.
• ekskluzywność – stawiamy na krótkie serie. A to oznacza, że nie uraczysz ich w co drugim domu. 

Jeśli marzysz o meblach, które z czasem zyskują na wartości, mamy dla Ciebie coś specjalnego. Realizujemy indywidualne projekty mebli i zabudów. To jak szycie garnituru na miarę, tylko że mówimy o Twoim wymarzonym wnętrzu.

Gotowy, by Twoje projekty stały się prawdziwym hitem wśród klientów? 

EN:

We are the only distributor in Poland offering laminated, metalized furniture boards made of natural wood – not low-grade recycled ones – as well as unique furniture fittings and handles.

What sets us apart? Three key things:

• Uncompromising quality – no cheap particle boards or poor-quality zinc fittings. Only top-tier home decor materials built to withstand the test of time.
• Bespoke design that takes your breath away – our materials aren’t just functional; they embody style and luxury.
• Exclusivity – we focus on short production runs. That means you won’t see our materials in every second home.

If you dream of furniture that gains value over time, we have something truly special for you.
We deliver custom-made furniture and built-in solutions – like a tailored suit, but for your perfect interior.

Ready to turn your designs into absolute hits with your clients?

Name: Living Lovely
Description:
Wij zijn Living Lovely, ontstaan uit de gedeelde passie van een moeder en zoon, die besloten om van hun liefde voor stijlvol wonen hun levenswerk te maken. Wat begon als een bescheiden hobby in 2019, is uitgegroeid tot een trots familiebedrijf.

Onze reis begon klein, maar elke stap was doordrenkt met toewijding en liefde voor het creëren van een warme en stijlvolle leefomgeving. Als familiebedrijf leggen we niet alleen de nadruk op het aanbieden van prachtige woonaccessoires, maar streven we er ook naar om de unieke sfeer en persoonlijkheid van elke ruimte te versterken.

Wat ons onderscheidt, is de zorgvuldige selectie van unieke producten en dat achter elk artikel een verhaal schuilt. Onze collectie weerspiegelt onze eigen smaak en voorkeuren en ook de liefde voor het ontdekken van verborgen schatten die een huis tot leven brengen.

Of je nu op zoek bent naar tijdloze elegantie, een vleugje Boho-chic of een stukje Ibiza in je interieur, Living Lovely biedt een eclectische mix van stijlen voor iedereen. We nodigen je uit om deel uit te maken van onze reis en de wonderlijke wereld van Living Lovely te verkennen, waar elk item is doordrenkt met onze passie voor een heerlijk en stijlvol leven.

Name: CREATIVE DESIGN d.o.o.
Description:
Creative design d.o.o. je tvrtka koja se pozicionirala visoko na tržištu opremanja ugostiteljskih objekata i postala lider u opremanju hotela, apartmana i rezidencijalnih objekata na području Dalmacije.

Iskustvo koje smo stekli opremajući brojne objekte utkali smo u svoj novi brend stolica ‘KA3GA’ iza kojeg stoje timovi, vodeći računa o svakom segmentu od ideje do realizacije kako bi našim klijentima ponudili vrhunsku kvalitetu i suvremeni dizajn.
Nakon samo godine dana postojanja, brend 'KA3GA' postao je sinonim  za kvalitetan, estetski i ergonomski oblikovan namještaj. Svakom proizvodu dajemo dozu posebnosti i promišljenosti kako bi se idealno uklopio u prostor.
Proizvodni pogon se prostire na 2300 m2 te se nalazi u Dalmatinskoj zagori, a prostor je opremljen sa najnovijim šivaćim strojevima te omogućuje znatno kraći rok isporuke i pristupačnije cijene krajnjeg proizvoda.
Misija tvrtke je praćenje trendova u opremanju interijera i zadovoljavanje potreba naših kupaca proizvodnjom visokokvalitetnih proizvoda sa naglaskom na tapecirane proizvode poput stolica, fotelja, separea i kreveta.
Vizija tvrtke da svojim iskustvom, kvalitetom i odgovornošću postane vodeći proizvođač stolica i ostalog tapeciranog namještaja u ovom dijelu Europe.

Name: Ash J Mac Studio
Description:
AshJMac Studio is a Niagara-based, Indigenous-led design studio specializing in contemporary furniture, product design, objects, and public art for residential, commercial, and public environments.

We partner with clients who value meaningful design, cultural depth, and high-quality craftsmanship. Our practice spans custom furniture, sculptural objects, and contract-ready pieces, integrating Indigenous design perspectives into contemporary spaces.

The studio collaborates with architects, interior designers, cities, developers, cultural institutions, and private collectors to create work that balances material integrity, storytelling, and long-term use. With a strong foundation in fabrication and production, projects are designed to meet both creative and technical requirements.

What We Do

• Contemporary Indigenous Furniture & Objects
Sculptural, functional pieces designed to elevate interiors through form, cultural narrative, and craftsmanship.

• Custom Commissions
One-of-a-kind furniture and objects tailored to specific spaces, brands, and project needs.

• Public Art
Small- and large-scale artworks for civic, cultural, and institutional contexts.

• Design Consulting & Creative Direction
Integrating Indigenous narratives, design approaches, and material thinking into projects.

• Fabrication & Material Design
High-quality production using both traditional and contemporary methods.

• Art Rental
Short- and long-term rentals for staging, exhibitions, film, editorial, and commercial use.

• Collaboration
Partnerships with brands, designers, organizations, and artists seeking Indigenous design perspectives.

Name: PG Goods
Description:
PG Goods is a leading family of bedding and lifestyle brands focused on comfort, simplicity, and purpose. We design and deliver exceptional home textile products through three core brands:

Ella Jayne – Our flagship line of elevated essentials, trusted by national retailers and loved by customers for its timeless comfort, thoughtful design, and proprietary innovations in bedding, pillows, and mattress protection.

Pillow Guy – Built for the modern man, Pillow Guy delivers sustainable, high-performance bedding that’s bold, simple, and hassle-free.

Pillow Gal – Expanding on Pillow Guy’s mission, Pillow Gal brings the same elevated quality and sustainable approach to a wider audience.

Where You’ll Find Us:
PG Goods products are available at top-tier retailers including Macy’s, Nordstrom, Target, Wayfair, Amazon, JC Penney, Rue Gilt Groupe, and HomeGoods, as well as through our direct-to-consumer platforms.

What Sets Us Apart:
We blend design-driven innovation with real consumer insights—resulting in products that not only perform, but resonate. With tens of thousands of 5-star reviews and major media features on The Today Show, Good Morning America, and CBS Deals, our brands are trusted by buyers and beloved by customers.

Giving Back:
PG Goods is proud to support the community through large-scale product donation programs and was honored with Goodwill’s 2024 Community Partnership Award for our commitment to helping the homeless in Los Angeles.

We believe great products can do more than look good—they can make people feel at home.
